Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(** Constructs instance of action-based strength for the actions of the endomorphisms by precomposition on fixed hom-categories of a bicategory, and from this, a signature.

Author: Ralph Matthes 2021

 *)

Require Import UniMath.Foundations.PartD.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.FunctorCategory.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PointedFunctors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.HorizontalComposition.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.whiskering.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PrecategoryBinProduct.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.AlternativeDefinitions.MonoidalCategoriesTensored.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.AlternativeDefinitions.MonoidalFunctorsTensored.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Adjunctions.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Equivalences.Core.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.MonoidalCategories.PointedFunctorsMonoidal.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.MonoidalCategories.Actions.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.MonoidalCategories.ConstructionOfActions.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.MonoidalCategories.ActionOfEndomorphismsInBicat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.MonoidalCategories.ActionBasedStrength.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.MonoidalCategories.MonoidalFromBicategory.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.MonoidalCategories.ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Bicat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Examples.BicatOfCats.
Require Import UniMath.SubstitutionSystems.Signatures.
Require Import UniMath.SubstitutionSystems.SignatureCategory.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Univalence.

Import Bicat.Notations.

Local Open Scope cat.

Section ActionBased_Strength_Between_Homs_In_Bicat.

Context {C : bicat}.
Context (c0 d0 d0': ob C).
Context {Mon_M : monoidal_cat}.

Local Definition Mon_endo: monoidal_cat
  := swapping_of_monoidal_cat (monoidal_cat_from_bicat_and_ob c0).

Context (U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_M Mon_endo).

Local Definition ab_strength_domain_action : action Mon_M (hom c0 d0')
  := reindexed_action Mon_M U (action_from_precomp c0 d0').
Local Definition ab_strength_target_action : action Mon_M (hom c0 d0)
  := reindexed_action Mon_M U (action_from_precomp c0 d0).

Context (F: hom c0 d0' ⟶ hom c0 d0).

Definition ab_strength_on_homs_in_bicat: UU
  := actionbased_strength Mon_M ab_strength_domain_action ab_strength_target_action F.

Identity Coercion ab_strength_on_homs_in_bicat_to_actionbased_strength :
  ab_strength_on_homs_in_bicat  >-> actionbased_strength.

Context (ab_str : ab_strength_on_homs_in_bicat).

Definition triangle_eq := actionbased_strength_triangle_eq Mon_M
  ab_strength_domain_action ab_strength_target_action F ab_str.
Definition pentagon_eq := actionbased_strength_pentagon_eq Mon_M
  ab_strength_domain_action ab_strength_target_action F ab_str.


C: bicat
c0, d0, d0': C
Mon_M: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_M Mon_endo
F: hom c0 d0' ⟶ hom c0 d0
ab_str: ab_strength_on_homs_in_bicat
triangle_eq =
(∏ a : C ⟦ c0, d0' ⟧,
 ab_str (a,, monoidal_cat_unit Mon_M)
 • # F
     (id₂ a ⋆⋆ strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_inv U
      • lunitor a) =
 id₂ (F a) ⋆⋆ strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_inv U
 • lunitor (F a))


C: bicat
c0, d0, d0': C
Mon_M: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_M Mon_endo
F: hom c0 d0' ⟶ hom c0 d0
ab_str: ab_strength_on_homs_in_bicat
triangle_eq =
(∏ a : C ⟦ c0, d0' ⟧,
 ab_str (a,, monoidal_cat_unit Mon_M)
 • # F
     (id₂ a ⋆⋆ strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_inv U
      • lunitor a) =
 id₂ (F a) ⋆⋆ strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_inv U
 • lunitor (F a))

  apply idpath.
Qed.

Definition triangle_eq_nice : UU := ∏ X : C ⟦ c0, d0' ⟧,
  ab_str (X,, monoidal_cat_unit Mon_M) • # F (strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_inv U ▹ X • lunitor X) =
  strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_inv U ▹ F X • lunitor (F X).


C: bicat
c0, d0, d0': C
Mon_M: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_M Mon_endo
F: hom c0 d0' ⟶ hom c0 d0
ab_str: ab_strength_on_homs_in_bicat
triangle_eq → triangle_eq_nice


C: bicat
c0, d0, d0': C
Mon_M: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_M Mon_endo
F: hom c0 d0' ⟶ hom c0 d0
ab_str: ab_strength_on_homs_in_bicat
triangle_eq → triangle_eq_nice

  
C: bicat
c0, d0, d0': C
Mon_M: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_M Mon_endo
F: hom c0 d0' ⟶ hom c0 d0
ab_str: ab_strength_on_homs_in_bicat
Heq: triangle_eq
triangle_eq_nice

  
C: bicat
c0, d0, d0': C
Mon_M: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_M Mon_endo
F: hom c0 d0' ⟶ hom c0 d0
ab_str: ab_strength_on_homs_in_bicat
Heq: triangle_eq
X: C ⟦ c0, d0' ⟧
ab_str (X,, monoidal_cat_unit Mon_M)
• # F
    ((strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_inv U ▹ X) • lunitor X) =
(strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_inv U ▹ F X)
• lunitor (F X)

  
C: bicat
c0, d0, d0': C
Mon_M: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_M Mon_endo
F: hom c0 d0' ⟶ hom c0 d0
ab_str: ab_strength_on_homs_in_bicat
Heq: triangle_eq
X: C ⟦ c0, d0' ⟧
HeqX:= Heq X: ab_str (X, ActionBasedStrength.I Mon_M)
· # F
    (ActionBasedStrength.ϱ Mon_M
       ab_strength_domain_action X) =
ActionBasedStrength.ϱ' Mon_M
  ab_strength_target_action 
  (F X)
ab_str (X,, monoidal_cat_unit Mon_M)
• # F
    ((strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_inv U ▹ X) • lunitor X) =
(strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_inv U ▹ F X)
• lunitor (F X)

  
C: bicat
c0, d0, d0': C
Mon_M: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_M Mon_endo
F: hom c0 d0' ⟶ hom c0 d0
ab_str: ab_strength_on_homs_in_bicat
Heq: triangle_eq
X: C ⟦ c0, d0' ⟧
HeqX:= Heq X: ab_str (X, ActionBasedStrength.I Mon_M)
• # F
    (id₂ X
     ⋆⋆ is_z_isomorphism_mor
          (strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_is_z_iso U)
     • lunitor X) =
id₂ (F X)
⋆⋆ is_z_isomorphism_mor
     (strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_is_z_iso U)
• lunitor (F X)
ab_str (X,, monoidal_cat_unit Mon_M)
• # F
    ((strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_inv U ▹ X) • lunitor X) =
(strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_inv U ▹ F X)
• lunitor (F X)

  
C: bicat
c0, d0, d0': C
Mon_M: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_M Mon_endo
F: hom c0 d0' ⟶ hom c0 d0
ab_str: ab_strength_on_homs_in_bicat
Heq: triangle_eq
X: C ⟦ c0, d0' ⟧
HeqX: ab_str (X, ActionBasedStrength.I Mon_M)
• # F
    ((is_z_isomorphism_mor
        (strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_is_z_iso U)
      ▹ X) • lunitor X) =
(is_z_isomorphism_mor
   (strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_is_z_iso U) ▹ 
 F X) • lunitor (F X)
ab_str (X,, monoidal_cat_unit Mon_M)
• # F
    ((strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_inv U ▹ X) • lunitor X) =
(strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_inv U ▹ F X)
• lunitor (F X)

  assumption.
Qed.


C: bicat
c0, d0, d0': C
Mon_M: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_M Mon_endo
F: hom c0 d0' ⟶ hom c0 d0
ab_str: ab_strength_on_homs_in_bicat
triangle_eq_nice → triangle_eq

U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_M Mon_endo
F: hom c0 d0' ⟶ hom c0 d0

F: hom c0 d0' ⟶ hom c0 d0

Heq: triangle_eq_nice
triangle_eq

  
C: bicat
c0, d0, d0': C
Mon_M: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_M Mon_endo
F: hom c0 d0' ⟶ hom c0 d0
ab_str: ab_strength_on_homs_in_bicat
Heq: triangle_eq_nice
X: hom c0 d0'
ab_str (X, ActionBasedStrength.I Mon_M)
· # F
    (ActionBasedStrength.ϱ Mon_M
       ab_strength_domain_action X) =
ActionBasedStrength.ϱ' Mon_M ab_strength_target_action
  (F X)

  
C: bicat
c0, d0, d0': C
Mon_M: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_M Mon_endo
F: hom c0 d0' ⟶ hom c0 d0
ab_str: ab_strength_on_homs_in_bicat
Heq: triangle_eq_nice
X: hom c0 d0'
ab_str (X, ActionBasedStrength.I Mon_M)
• # F
    (id₂ X
     ⋆⋆ is_z_isomorphism_mor
          (strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_is_z_iso U)
     • lunitor X) =
id₂ (F X)
⋆⋆ is_z_isomorphism_mor
     (strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_is_z_iso U)
• lunitor (F X)

  
C: bicat
c0, d0, d0': C
Mon_M: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_M Mon_endo
F: hom c0 d0' ⟶ hom c0 d0
ab_str: ab_strength_on_homs_in_bicat
Heq: triangle_eq_nice
X: hom c0 d0'
ab_str (X, ActionBasedStrength.I Mon_M)
• # F
    ((is_z_isomorphism_mor
        (strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_is_z_iso U) ▹ X)
     • lunitor X) =
(is_z_isomorphism_mor
   (strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_is_z_iso U) ▹ F X)
• lunitor (F X)

  apply Heq.
Qed.


C: bicat
c0, d0, d0': C
Mon_M: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_M Mon_endo
F: hom c0 d0' ⟶ hom c0 d0
ab_str: ab_strength_on_homs_in_bicat
pentagon_eq =
(∏ (a : C ⟦ c0, d0' ⟧) (x y : Mon_M),
 (lassociator (U y) (U x) (F a)
  • id₂ (F a) ⋆⋆ lax_monoidal_functor_μ U (x,, y))
 • ab_str (a,, monoidal_cat_tensor Mon_M (x, y)) =
 (ab_str (a,, x) ⋆⋆ # U (id₁ y) • ab_str (U x · a,, y))
 • # F
     (lassociator (U y) (U x) a
      • id₂ a ⋆⋆ lax_monoidal_functor_μ U (x,, y)))


C: bicat
c0, d0, d0': C
Mon_M: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_M Mon_endo
F: hom c0 d0' ⟶ hom c0 d0
ab_str: ab_strength_on_homs_in_bicat
pentagon_eq =
(∏ (a : C ⟦ c0, d0' ⟧) (x y : Mon_M),
 (lassociator (U y) (U x) (F a)
  • id₂ (F a) ⋆⋆ lax_monoidal_functor_μ U (x,, y))
 • ab_str (a,, monoidal_cat_tensor Mon_M (x, y)) =
 (ab_str (a,, x) ⋆⋆ # U (id₁ y) • ab_str (U x · a,, y))
 • # F
     (lassociator (U y) (U x) a
      • id₂ a ⋆⋆ lax_monoidal_functor_μ U (x,, y)))

  apply idpath.
Qed.


(** the variables chosen in the following make the link with the notion of signature
    in the TYPES'15 paper by Ahrens and Matthes more visible - but Z is written insted
    of (Z,e), and likewise for Z' *)

Definition pentagon_eq_nice : UU :=
  ∏ (X : C ⟦ c0, d0' ⟧) (Z' Z : Mon_M),
    lassociator (U Z) (U Z') (F X) • (lax_monoidal_functor_μ U (Z',, Z) ▹ F X) • ab_str (X,, monoidal_cat_tensor Mon_M (Z', Z)) =
    U Z ◃ ab_str (X,, Z') • ab_str (U Z' · X,, Z) • # F (lassociator (U Z) (U Z') X • (lax_monoidal_functor_μ U (Z',, Z) ▹ X)).


C: bicat
c0, d0, d0': C
Mon_M: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_M Mon_endo
F: hom c0 d0' ⟶ hom c0 d0
ab_str: ab_strength_on_homs_in_bicat
pentagon_eq → pentagon_eq_nice


C: bicat
c0, d0, d0': C
Mon_M: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_M Mon_endo
F: hom c0 d0' ⟶ hom c0 d0
ab_str: ab_strength_on_homs_in_bicat
pentagon_eq → pentagon_eq_nice

  
C: bicat
c0, d0, d0': C
Mon_M: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_M Mon_endo
F: hom c0 d0' ⟶ hom c0 d0
ab_str: ab_strength_on_homs_in_bicat
Heq: pentagon_eq
X: C ⟦ c0, d0' ⟧
Z', Z: Mon_M
(lassociator (U Z) (U Z') (F X)
 • (lax_monoidal_functor_μ U (Z',, Z) ▹ F X))
• ab_str (X,, monoidal_cat_tensor Mon_M (Z', Z)) =
((U Z ◃ ab_str (X,, Z')) • ab_str (U Z' · X,, Z))
• # F
    (lassociator (U Z) (U Z') X
     • (lax_monoidal_functor_μ U (Z',, Z) ▹ X))

  
C: bicat
c0, d0, d0': C
Mon_M: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_M Mon_endo
F: hom c0 d0' ⟶ hom c0 d0
ab_str: ab_strength_on_homs_in_bicat
Heq: pentagon_eq
X: C ⟦ c0, d0' ⟧
Z', Z: Mon_M
Heqinst: ActionBasedStrength.χ' Mon_M
  ab_strength_target_action 
  ((F X, Z'), Z)
· ab_str
    (X,
    ActionBasedStrength.tensor Mon_M
      (Z',, Z)) =
# (act_odot ab_strength_target_action)
  (ab_str (X, Z') #, id₁ Z)
· ab_str
    (act_odot ab_strength_domain_action
       (X, Z'), Z)
· # F
    (ActionBasedStrength.χ Mon_M
       ab_strength_domain_action
       ((X, Z'), Z))
(lassociator (U Z) (U Z') (F X)
 • (lax_monoidal_functor_μ U (Z',, Z) ▹ F X))
• ab_str (X,, monoidal_cat_tensor Mon_M (Z', Z)) =
((U Z ◃ ab_str (X,, Z')) • ab_str (U Z' · X,, Z))
• # F
    (lassociator (U Z) (U Z') X
     • (lax_monoidal_functor_μ U (Z',, Z) ▹ X))

c0, d0, d0': C

U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_M Mon_endo

ab_str: ab_strength_on_homs_in_bicat

· ab_str
    (X,
    ActionBasedStrength.tensor Mon_M
      (Z',, Z)) =
ab_str (X, Z') ⋆⋆ id₁ (U Z)
· ab_str (U Z' · X, Z)
· # F
    (ActionBasedStrength.χ Mon_M
       ab_strength_domain_action
       ((X, Z'), Z))
ab_str (X, Z') ⋆⋆ id₁ (U Z) · ab_str (U Z' · X, Z)
· # F
    (ActionBasedStrength.χ Mon_M
       ab_strength_domain_action 
       ((X, Z'), Z)) =
((U Z ◃ ab_str (X,, Z')) • ab_str (U Z' · X,, Z))
• # F
    (lassociator (U Z) (U Z') X
     • (lax_monoidal_functor_μ U (Z',, Z) ▹ X))

  
C: bicat
c0, d0, d0': C
Mon_M: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_M Mon_endo
F: hom c0 d0' ⟶ hom c0 d0
ab_str: ab_strength_on_homs_in_bicat
X: C ⟦ c0, d0' ⟧
Z', Z: Mon_M
Heqinst: ActionBasedStrength.χ' Mon_M
  ab_strength_target_action 
  ((F X, Z'), Z)
· ab_str
    (X,
    ActionBasedStrength.tensor Mon_M
      (Z',, Z)) =
ab_str (X, Z') ⋆⋆ id₁ (U Z)
· ab_str (U Z' · X, Z)
· # F
    (ActionBasedStrength.χ Mon_M
       ab_strength_domain_action
       ((X, Z'), Z))
ActionBasedStrength.χ' Mon_M ab_strength_target_action
  ((F X, Z'), Z)
· ab_str
    (X, ActionBasedStrength.tensor Mon_M (Z',, Z)) =
(lassociator (U Z) (U Z') (F X)
 • (lax_monoidal_functor_μ U (Z',, Z) ▹ F X))
• ab_str (X,, monoidal_cat_tensor Mon_M (Z', Z))

F: hom c0 d0' ⟶ hom c0 d0

ab_str (X, Z') ⋆⋆ id₁ (U Z)
· ab_str (U Z' · X, Z)
· # F
    (ActionBasedStrength.χ Mon_M
       ab_strength_domain_action
       ((X, Z'), Z))
(precomp_convertor_nat_trans_data c0 d0
   ((F X, U Z'), U Z)
 • id₂ (F X) ⋆⋆ lax_monoidal_functor_μ U (Z',, Z))
• ab_str
    (X, ActionBasedStrength.tensor Mon_M (Z',, Z)) =
(lassociator (U Z) (U Z') (F X)
 • (lax_monoidal_functor_μ U (Z',, Z) ▹ F X))
• ab_str (X,, monoidal_cat_tensor Mon_M (Z', Z))

c0, d0, d0': C
Mon_M: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_M Mon_endo
F: hom c0 d0' ⟶ hom c0 d0
ab_str: ab_strength_on_homs_in_bicat

Z', Z: Mon_M

  ab_strength_target_action

· ab_str
    (X,
    ActionBasedStrength.tensor Mon_M
      (Z',, Z)) =
ab_str (X, Z') ⋆⋆ id₁ (U Z)
· ab_str (U Z' · X, Z)
· # F
    (ActionBasedStrength.χ Mon_M
       ab_strength_domain_action
       ((X, Z'), Z))
precomp_convertor_nat_trans_data c0 d0
  ((F X, U Z'), U Z)
• id₂ (F X) ⋆⋆ lax_monoidal_functor_μ U (Z',, Z) =
lassociator (U Z) (U Z') (F X)
• (lax_monoidal_functor_μ U (Z',, Z) ▹ F X)

    
C: bicat
c0, d0, d0': C
Mon_M: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_M Mon_endo
F: hom c0 d0' ⟶ hom c0 d0
ab_str: ab_strength_on_homs_in_bicat
X: C ⟦ c0, d0' ⟧
Z', Z: Mon_M
Heqinst: ActionBasedStrength.χ' Mon_M
  ab_strength_target_action 
  ((F X, Z'), Z)
· ab_str
    (X,
    ActionBasedStrength.tensor Mon_M
      (Z',, Z)) =
ab_str (X, Z') ⋆⋆ id₁ (U Z)
· ab_str (U Z' · X, Z)
· # F
    (ActionBasedStrength.χ Mon_M
       ab_strength_domain_action
       ((X, Z'), Z))
id₂ (F X) ⋆⋆ lax_monoidal_functor_μ U (Z',, Z) =
lax_monoidal_functor_μ U (Z',, Z) ▹ F X

    exact (hcomp_identity_right _ _ (F X) (lax_monoidal_functor_μ U (Z',, Z))).

c0, d0, d0': C
Mon_M: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_M Mon_endo
F: hom c0 d0' ⟶ hom c0 d0

       ((X, Z'), Z))
id₂ X ⋆⋆ lax_monoidal_functor_μ U (Z',, Z) =
lax_monoidal_functor_μ U (Z',, Z) ▹ X

    apply hcomp_identity_right.

  ((F X, Z'), Z)
· ab_str
    (X, ActionBasedStrength.tensor Mon_M (Z',, Z)) =
# (act_odot ab_strength_target_action)
  (ab_str (X, Z') #, id₁ Z)
· ab_str
    (act_odot ab_strength_domain_action (X, Z'), Z)
· # F
    (ActionBasedStrength.χ Mon_M
       ab_strength_domain_action ((X, Z'), Z))

      apply hcomp_identity_left.
    
C: bicat
c0, d0, d0': C
Mon_M: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_M Mon_endo
F: hom c0 d0' ⟶ hom c0 d0
ab_str: ab_strength_on_homs_in_bicat
Heq: pentagon_eq_nice
X: hom c0 d0'
Z', Z: Mon_M
(U Z ◃ ab_str (X, Z')) · ab_str (U Z' · X, Z)
· # F
    (ActionBasedStrength.χ Mon_M
       ab_strength_domain_action ((X, Z'), Z)) =
((U Z ◃ ab_str (X,, Z')) • ab_str (U Z' · X,, Z))
• # F
    (lassociator (U Z) (U Z') X
     • (lax_monoidal_functor_μ U (Z',, Z) ▹ X))

    
C: bicat
c0, d0, d0': C
Mon_M: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_M Mon_endo
F: hom c0 d0' ⟶ hom c0 d0
ab_str: ab_strength_on_homs_in_bicat
Heq: pentagon_eq_nice
X: hom c0 d0'
Z', Z: Mon_M
((U Z ◃ ab_str (X, Z')) • ab_str (U Z' · X, Z))
• # F
    (precomp_convertor_nat_trans_data c0 d0'
       ((X, U Z'), U Z)
     • id₂ X ⋆⋆ lax_monoidal_functor_μ U (Z',, Z)) =
((U Z ◃ ab_str (X,, Z')) • ab_str (U Z' · X,, Z))
• # F
    (lassociator (U Z) (U Z') X
     • (lax_monoidal_functor_μ U (Z',, Z) ▹ X))

    
C: bicat
c0, d0, d0': C
Mon_M: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_M Mon_endo
F: hom c0 d0' ⟶ hom c0 d0
ab_str: ab_strength_on_homs_in_bicat
Heq: pentagon_eq_nice
X: hom c0 d0'
Z', Z: Mon_M
id₂ X ⋆⋆ lax_monoidal_functor_μ U (Z',, Z) =
lax_monoidal_functor_μ U (Z',, Z) ▹ X

    apply hcomp_identity_right.
Qed.

Definition μ_UZ'Zinv (Z' Z : Mon_M) :
  hom c0 c0 ⟦ monoidal_functor_map_codom Mon_M Mon_endo U (Z',, Z),
              monoidal_functor_map_dom Mon_M Mon_endo U (Z',, Z) ⟧
  := strong_monoidal_functor_μ_inv U (Z',,Z).

Definition pentagon_eq_nicer : UU :=
  ∏ (X : C ⟦ c0, d0' ⟧) (Z' Z : Mon_M),
                         lassociator (U Z) (U Z') (F X) • (lax_monoidal_functor_μ U (Z',, Z) ▹ F X) •
                         ab_str (X,, monoidal_cat_tensor Mon_M (Z', Z)) •
                         # F ((μ_UZ'Zinv Z' Z ▹ X) • rassociator (U Z) (U Z') X) =
                         U Z ◃ ab_str (X,, Z') • ab_str (U Z' · X,, Z).


C: bicat
c0, d0, d0': C
Mon_M: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_M Mon_endo
F: hom c0 d0' ⟶ hom c0 d0
ab_str: ab_strength_on_homs_in_bicat
pentagon_eq_nice → pentagon_eq_nicer

  • (lax_monoidal_functor_μ U (Z',, Z) ▹ F X))
 • ab_str (X,, monoidal_cat_tensor Mon_M (Z', Z)))
• # F
    ((μ_UZ'Zinv Z' Z ▹ X) • rassociator (U Z) (U Z') X) =
(U Z ◃ ab_str (X,, Z')) • ab_str (U Z' · X,, Z)

U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_M Mon_endo
F: hom c0 d0' ⟶ hom c0 d0
ab_str: ab_strength_on_homs_in_bicat
X: C ⟦ c0, d0' ⟧
Z', Z: Mon_M
?b = id₂ (U Z · U Z' · X)

  
C: bicat
c0, d0, d0': C
Mon_M: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_M Mon_endo
F: hom c0 d0' ⟶ hom c0 d0
ab_str: ab_strength_on_homs_in_bicat
X: C ⟦ c0, d0' ⟧
Z', Z: Mon_M
(lax_monoidal_functor_μ U (Z',, Z)
 • is_z_isomorphism_mor
     (strong_monoidal_functor_μ_is_nat_z_iso U
        (Z',, Z))) ▹ X = ?b
 
C: bicat
c0, d0, d0': C
Mon_M: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_M Mon_endo
F: hom c0 d0' ⟶ hom c0 d0
ab_str: ab_strength_on_homs_in_bicat
X: C ⟦ c0, d0' ⟧
Z', Z: Mon_M
lax_monoidal_functor_μ U (Z',, Z)
• is_z_isomorphism_mor
    (strong_monoidal_functor_μ_is_nat_z_iso U (Z',, Z)) =
?t2

    apply (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (strong_monoidal_functor_μ U) (Z',,Z))).
  
C: bicat
c0, d0, d0': C
Mon_M: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_M Mon_endo
F: hom c0 d0' ⟶ hom c0 d0
ab_str: ab_strength_on_homs_in_bicat
X: C ⟦ c0, d0' ⟧
Z', Z: Mon_M
id₁
  (monoidal_functor_map_dom Mon_M Mon_endo U (Z',, Z))
▹ X = id₂ (U Z · U Z' · X)

  apply id2_rwhisker.
Qed.

Mon_M: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_M Mon_endo
F: hom c0 d0' ⟶ hom c0 d0
ab_str: ab_strength_on_homs_in_bicat
pentagon_eq_nicer → pentagon_eq_nice

U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_M Mon_endo

C: bicat
c0, d0, d0': C
Mon_M: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_M Mon_endo
F: hom c0 d0' ⟶ hom c0 d0
ab_str: ab_strength_on_homs_in_bicat
Heq: pentagon_eq_nicer
X: C ⟦ c0, d0' ⟧
Z', Z: Mon_M
(lassociator (U Z) (U Z') (F X)
 • (lax_monoidal_functor_μ U (Z',, Z) ▹ F X))
• ab_str (X,, monoidal_cat_tensor Mon_M (Z', Z)) =
((U Z ◃ ab_str (X,, Z')) • ab_str (U Z' · X,, Z))
• # F
    (lassociator (U Z) (U Z') X
     • (lax_monoidal_functor_μ U (Z',, Z) ▹ X))

  
C: bicat
c0, d0, d0': C
Mon_M: monoidal_cat

F: hom c0 d0' ⟶ hom c0 d0
ab_str: ab_strength_on_homs_in_bicat
X: C ⟦ c0, d0' ⟧
Z', Z: Mon_M
Heq: ((lassociator (U Z) (U Z') (F X)
  • (lax_monoidal_functor_μ U (Z',, Z) ▹ F X))
 • ab_str
     (X,, monoidal_cat_tensor Mon_M (Z', Z)))
• # F
    ((μ_UZ'Zinv Z' Z ▹ X)
     • rassociator (U Z) (U Z') X) =
(U Z ◃ ab_str (X,, Z')) • ab_str (U Z' · X,, Z)
(lassociator (U Z) (U Z') (F X)
 • (lax_monoidal_functor_μ U (Z',, Z) ▹ F X))
• ab_str (X,, monoidal_cat_tensor Mon_M (Z', Z)) =

    (lassociator (U Z) (U Z') X
     • (lax_monoidal_functor_μ U (Z',, Z) ▹ X))

  • (lax_monoidal_functor_μ U (Z',, Z) ▹ F X))
 • ab_str

?y = (U Z ◃ ab_str (X,, Z')) • ab_str (U Z' · X,, Z)

       exact Heq.

C: bicat
c0, d0, d0': C
Mon_M: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_M Mon_endo
F: hom c0 d0' ⟶ hom c0 d0
ab_str: ab_strength_on_homs_in_bicat
X: C ⟦ c0, d0' ⟧
Z', Z: Mon_M
ab_str (X,, monoidal_cat_tensor Mon_M (Z', Z))
• id₂
    (actionbased_strength_codom Mon_M
       ab_strength_domain_action F
       (X,, monoidal_cat_tensor Mon_M (Z', Z))) =
ab_str (X,, monoidal_cat_tensor Mon_M (Z', Z))
• (# F
     ((μ_UZ'Zinv Z' Z ▹ X)
      • rassociator (U Z) (U Z') X)
   • # F
       (lassociator (U Z) (U Z') X
        • (lax_monoidal_functor_μ U (Z',, Z) ▹ X)))

  
C: bicat

Mon_M: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_M Mon_endo
F: hom c0 d0' ⟶ hom c0 d0
ab_str: ab_strength_on_homs_in_bicat
X: C ⟦ c0, d0' ⟧
Z', Z: Mon_M
id₂
  (actionbased_strength_codom Mon_M
     ab_strength_domain_action F
     (X,, monoidal_cat_tensor Mon_M (Z', Z))) =
# F
  ((μ_UZ'Zinv Z' Z ▹ X) • rassociator (U Z) (U Z') X)
• # F
    (lassociator (U Z) (U Z') X
     • (lax_monoidal_functor_μ U (Z',, Z) ▹ X))

 apply (functor_comp(C:=hom c0 d0')(C':=hom c0 d0)).

ab_str: ab_strength_on_homs_in_bicat
X: C ⟦ c0, d0' ⟧
Z', Z: Mon_M
?b =
id₁
  (monoidal_functor_map_codom Mon_M Mon_endo U
     (Z',, Z) · X)

  
C: bicat
c0, d0, d0': C
Mon_M: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_M Mon_endo
F: hom c0 d0' ⟶ hom c0 d0
ab_str: ab_strength_on_homs_in_bicat
X: C ⟦ c0, d0' ⟧
Z', Z: Mon_M
((μ_UZ'Zinv Z' Z ▹ X)
 • (rassociator (U Z) (U Z') X
    • lassociator (U Z) (U Z') X))
• (lax_monoidal_functor_μ U (Z',, Z) ▹ X) = ?b

    
C: bicat
c0, d0, d0': C
Mon_M: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_M Mon_endo
F: hom c0 d0' ⟶ hom c0 d0
ab_str: ab_strength_on_homs_in_bicat
X: C ⟦ c0, d0' ⟧
Z', Z: Mon_M
(μ_UZ'Zinv Z' Z ▹ X)
• (rassociator (U Z) (U Z') X
   • lassociator (U Z) (U Z') X) = ?y'

    
C: bicat
c0, d0, d0': C
Mon_M: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_M Mon_endo
F: hom c0 d0' ⟶ hom c0 d0
ab_str: ab_strength_on_homs_in_bicat
X: C ⟦ c0, d0' ⟧
Z', Z: Mon_M
(μ_UZ'Zinv Z' Z ▹ X)
• (rassociator (U Z) (U Z') X
   • lassociator (U Z) (U Z') X) = ?b
C: bicat
c0, d0, d0': C
Mon_M: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_M Mon_endo
F: hom c0 d0' ⟶ hom c0 d0
ab_str: ab_strength_on_homs_in_bicat
X: C ⟦ c0, d0' ⟧
Z', Z: Mon_M
?b = ?y'

    
C: bicat
c0, d0, d0': C
Mon_M: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_M Mon_endo
F: hom c0 d0' ⟶ hom c0 d0
ab_str: ab_strength_on_homs_in_bicat
X: C ⟦ c0, d0' ⟧
Z', Z: Mon_M
(μ_UZ'Zinv Z' Z ▹ X)
• (rassociator (U Z) (U Z') X
   • lassociator (U Z) (U Z') X) = ?b

      
C: bicat
c0, d0, d0': C
Mon_M: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_M Mon_endo
F: hom c0 d0' ⟶ hom c0 d0
ab_str: ab_strength_on_homs_in_bicat
X: C ⟦ c0, d0' ⟧
Z', Z: Mon_M
rassociator (U Z) (U Z') X
• lassociator (U Z) (U Z') X = ?t2

      apply rassociator_lassociator.
    
C: bicat
c0, d0, d0': C
Mon_M: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_M Mon_endo
F: hom c0 d0' ⟶ hom c0 d0
ab_str: ab_strength_on_homs_in_bicat
X: C ⟦ c0, d0' ⟧
Z', Z: Mon_M
(μ_UZ'Zinv Z' Z ▹ X) • id₂ (U Z · U Z' · X) = ?y'

    apply id2_right.
  
C: bicat
c0, d0, d0': C
Mon_M: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_M Mon_endo
F: hom c0 d0' ⟶ hom c0 d0
ab_str: ab_strength_on_homs_in_bicat
X: C ⟦ c0, d0' ⟧
Z', Z: Mon_M
(μ_UZ'Zinv Z' Z ▹ X)
• (lax_monoidal_functor_μ U (Z',, Z) ▹ X) =
id₁
  (monoidal_functor_map_codom Mon_M Mon_endo U
     (Z',, Z) · X)

  
C: bicat
c0, d0, d0': C
Mon_M: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_M Mon_endo
F: hom c0 d0' ⟶ hom c0 d0
ab_str: ab_strength_on_homs_in_bicat
X: C ⟦ c0, d0' ⟧
Z', Z: Mon_M
(μ_UZ'Zinv Z' Z • lax_monoidal_functor_μ U (Z',, Z))
▹ X =
id₁
  (monoidal_functor_map_codom Mon_M Mon_endo U
     (Z',, Z) · X)

  
C: bicat
c0, d0, d0': C
Mon_M: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_M Mon_endo
F: hom c0 d0' ⟶ hom c0 d0
ab_str: ab_strength_on_homs_in_bicat
X: C ⟦ c0, d0' ⟧
Z', Z: Mon_M
(μ_UZ'Zinv Z' Z • lax_monoidal_functor_μ U (Z',, Z))
▹ X = ?b
C: bicat
c0, d0, d0': C
Mon_M: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_M Mon_endo
F: hom c0 d0' ⟶ hom c0 d0
ab_str: ab_strength_on_homs_in_bicat
X: C ⟦ c0, d0' ⟧
Z', Z: Mon_M
?b =
id₁
  (monoidal_functor_map_codom Mon_M Mon_endo U
     (Z',, Z) · X)

  
C: bicat
c0, d0, d0': C
Mon_M: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_M Mon_endo
F: hom c0 d0' ⟶ hom c0 d0
ab_str: ab_strength_on_homs_in_bicat
X: C ⟦ c0, d0' ⟧
Z', Z: Mon_M
(μ_UZ'Zinv Z' Z • lax_monoidal_functor_μ U (Z',, Z))
▹ X = ?b
 
C: bicat
c0, d0, d0': C
Mon_M: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_M Mon_endo
F: hom c0 d0' ⟶ hom c0 d0
ab_str: ab_strength_on_homs_in_bicat
X: C ⟦ c0, d0' ⟧
Z', Z: Mon_M
μ_UZ'Zinv Z' Z • lax_monoidal_functor_μ U (Z',, Z) =
?t2

    apply (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (strong_monoidal_functor_μ U) (Z',,Z))).
  
C: bicat
c0, d0, d0': C
Mon_M: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_M Mon_endo
F: hom c0 d0' ⟶ hom c0 d0
ab_str: ab_strength_on_homs_in_bicat
X: C ⟦ c0, d0' ⟧
Z', Z: Mon_M
id₁
  (monoidal_functor_map_codom Mon_M Mon_endo U
     (Z',, Z)) ▹ X =
id₁
  (monoidal_functor_map_codom Mon_M Mon_endo U
     (Z',, Z) · X)

  apply id2_rwhisker.
Qed.


End ActionBased_Strength_Between_Homs_In_Bicat.

Section Instantiation_To_FunctorCategory_And_PointedEndofunctors.

Section a_different_type_for_the_forgetful_functor_from_ptd.
  Context (C : category).

  
C: category
category_Ptd C ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob C

  
C: category
category_Ptd C ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob C

    
C: category
functor_data (category_Ptd C)
  (category_from_bicat_and_ob C)
C: category
is_functor ?F

    
C: category
functor_data (category_Ptd C)
  (category_from_bicat_and_ob C)
 
C: category
∏ a b : category_Ptd C,
category_Ptd C ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ category_from_bicat_and_ob C ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b ⟧

      exact (λ a b f, pr1 f).
    
C: category
is_functor
  ((λ a : ∑ F : C ⟶ C, functor_identity C ⟹ F, pr1 a),,
   (λ (a b : category_Ptd C)
    (f : category_Ptd C ⟦ a, b ⟧), pr1 f))
 abstract (split; intros; red; intros; apply idpath).
  Defined.

  
C: category
monoidal_functor_map
  (monoidal_cat_of_pointedfunctors C)
  (monoidal_cat_from_bicat_and_ob C)
  functor_ptd_forget_alt

  
C: category
monoidal_functor_map
  (monoidal_cat_of_pointedfunctors C)
  (monoidal_cat_from_bicat_and_ob C)
  functor_ptd_forget_alt

    
C: category
monoidal_functor_map_dom
  (monoidal_cat_of_pointedfunctors C)
  (monoidal_cat_from_bicat_and_ob C)
  functor_ptd_forget_alt
⟹ monoidal_functor_map_codom
    (monoidal_cat_of_pointedfunctors C)
    (monoidal_cat_from_bicat_and_ob C)
    functor_ptd_forget_alt

    
C: category
nat_trans_data
  (monoidal_functor_map_dom
     (monoidal_cat_of_pointedfunctors C)
     (monoidal_cat_from_bicat_and_ob C)
     functor_ptd_forget_alt)
  (monoidal_functor_map_codom
     (monoidal_cat_of_pointedfunctors C)
     (monoidal_cat_from_bicat_and_ob C)
     functor_ptd_forget_alt)
C: category
is_nat_trans
  (monoidal_functor_map_dom
     (monoidal_cat_of_pointedfunctors C)
     (monoidal_cat_from_bicat_and_ob C)
     functor_ptd_forget_alt)
  (monoidal_functor_map_codom
     (monoidal_cat_of_pointedfunctors C)
     (monoidal_cat_from_bicat_and_ob C)
     functor_ptd_forget_alt) ?t

    
C: category
nat_trans_data
  (monoidal_functor_map_dom
     (monoidal_cat_of_pointedfunctors C)
     (monoidal_cat_from_bicat_and_ob C)
     functor_ptd_forget_alt)
  (monoidal_functor_map_codom
     (monoidal_cat_of_pointedfunctors C)
     (monoidal_cat_from_bicat_and_ob C)
     functor_ptd_forget_alt)
 
C: category
x: monoidal_cat_of_pointedfunctors C
⊠ monoidal_cat_of_pointedfunctors C
monoidal_cat_from_bicat_and_ob C
⟦ monoidal_functor_map_dom
    (monoidal_cat_of_pointedfunctors C)
    (monoidal_cat_from_bicat_and_ob C)
    functor_ptd_forget_alt x,
monoidal_functor_map_codom
  (monoidal_cat_of_pointedfunctors C)
  (monoidal_cat_from_bicat_and_ob C)
  functor_ptd_forget_alt x ⟧
 
C: category
x: monoidal_cat_of_pointedfunctors C
⊠ monoidal_cat_of_pointedfunctors C
functor_composite_data (pr11 x) (pr12 x)
⟹ functor_composite_data (pr11 x) (pr12 x)
 apply nat_trans_id.
    
C: category
is_nat_trans
  (monoidal_functor_map_dom
     (monoidal_cat_of_pointedfunctors C)
     (monoidal_cat_from_bicat_and_ob C)
     functor_ptd_forget_alt)
  (monoidal_functor_map_codom
     (monoidal_cat_of_pointedfunctors C)
     (monoidal_cat_from_bicat_and_ob C)
     functor_ptd_forget_alt)
  ((λ x : monoidal_cat_of_pointedfunctors C
          ⊠ monoidal_cat_of_pointedfunctors C,
    nat_trans_id
      (functor_composite_data (pr11 x) (pr12 x))
    :
    monoidal_cat_from_bicat_and_ob C
    ⟦ monoidal_functor_map_dom
        (monoidal_cat_of_pointedfunctors C)
        (monoidal_cat_from_bicat_and_ob C)
        functor_ptd_forget_alt x,
    monoidal_functor_map_codom
      (monoidal_cat_of_pointedfunctors C)
      (monoidal_cat_from_bicat_and_ob C)
      functor_ptd_forget_alt x ⟧)
   :
   nat_trans_data
     (monoidal_functor_map_dom
        (monoidal_cat_of_pointedfunctors C)
        (monoidal_cat_from_bicat_and_ob C)
        functor_ptd_forget_alt)
     (monoidal_functor_map_codom
        (monoidal_cat_of_pointedfunctors C)
        (monoidal_cat_from_bicat_and_ob C)
        functor_ptd_forget_alt))
 abstract ( intros xy xy' fg; apply nat_trans_eq_alt;
                 intro c; cbn; rewrite id_left, id_right; apply idpath ).
  Defined.

  
C: category
strong_monoidal_functor
  (monoidal_cat_of_pointedfunctors C)
  (monoidal_cat_from_bicat_and_ob C)

  
C: category
strong_monoidal_functor
  (monoidal_cat_of_pointedfunctors C)
  (monoidal_cat_from_bicat_and_ob C)

    
C: category
lax_monoidal_functor
  (monoidal_cat_of_pointedfunctors C)
  (monoidal_cat_from_bicat_and_ob C)
C: category
(λ lmF : lax_monoidal_functor
           (monoidal_cat_of_pointedfunctors C)
           (monoidal_cat_from_bicat_and_ob C),
 is_z_isomorphism (lax_monoidal_functor_ϵ lmF)
 × is_nat_z_iso (lax_monoidal_functor_μ lmF)) ?pr1

    
C: category
lax_monoidal_functor
  (monoidal_cat_of_pointedfunctors C)
  (monoidal_cat_from_bicat_and_ob C)
 
C: category
monoidal_functor_associativity
  (monoidal_cat_of_pointedfunctors C)
  (monoidal_cat_from_bicat_and_ob C)
  functor_ptd_forget_alt aux
C: category
monoidal_functor_unitality
  (monoidal_cat_of_pointedfunctors C)
  (monoidal_cat_from_bicat_and_ob C)
  functor_ptd_forget_alt
  (nat_trans_id
     (MonoidalFunctorsTensored.I_D
        (monoidal_cat_from_bicat_and_ob C))) aux

      
C: category
monoidal_functor_associativity
  (monoidal_cat_of_pointedfunctors C)
  (monoidal_cat_from_bicat_and_ob C)
  functor_ptd_forget_alt aux
 abstract
          (intros PF1 PF2 PF3 ;
           apply nat_trans_eq_alt ;
           intro c ;
           cbn ;
           do 2 rewrite functor_id ;
           repeat rewrite id_right ;
           apply functor_id).
      
C: category
monoidal_functor_unitality
  (monoidal_cat_of_pointedfunctors C)
  (monoidal_cat_from_bicat_and_ob C)
  functor_ptd_forget_alt
  (nat_trans_id
     (MonoidalFunctorsTensored.I_D
        (monoidal_cat_from_bicat_and_ob C))) aux
 abstract
          (intro PF ;
           split; apply nat_trans_eq_alt; intro c; cbn ;
             [ do 3 rewrite id_right ;
               apply pathsinv0 ;
               apply functor_id
             | do 3 rewrite id_right ;
               apply idpath]).
    
C: category
(λ lmF : lax_monoidal_functor
           (monoidal_cat_of_pointedfunctors C)
           (monoidal_cat_from_bicat_and_ob C),
 is_z_isomorphism (lax_monoidal_functor_ϵ lmF)
 × is_nat_z_iso (lax_monoidal_functor_μ lmF))
  (make_lax_monoidal_functor
     (monoidal_cat_of_pointedfunctors C)
     (monoidal_cat_from_bicat_and_ob C)
     functor_ptd_forget_alt
     (nat_trans_id
        (MonoidalFunctorsTensored.I_D
           (monoidal_cat_from_bicat_and_ob C))) aux
     forgetful_functor_from_ptd_as_strong_monoidal_functor_alt_subproof
     forgetful_functor_from_ptd_as_strong_monoidal_functor_alt_subproof0)
 split ;
        [ apply (nat_trafo_z_iso_if_pointwise_z_iso (homset_property _));
          apply is_nat_z_iso_nat_trans_id
        | red ; intro c ;
          exists (nat_trans_id _) ;
          split; cbn ;
          [ apply nat_trans_eq; [apply homset_property |] ; intro c'; cbn ;
            apply id_left
          | apply nat_trans_eq; [apply homset_property |]; intro c'; cbn ;
            apply id_left ]].
  Defined.

End a_different_type_for_the_forgetful_functor_from_ptd.

Context (C D D' : category).

Local Definition forget := swapping_of_strong_monoidal_functor(forgetful_functor_from_ptd_as_strong_monoidal_functor_alt C).


(* the following in order to understand why [forgetful_functor_from_ptd_as_strong_monoidal_functor_alt] is needed here *)
Local Definition moncat1 : monoidal_cat := swapping_of_monoidal_cat (EndofunctorsMonoidal.monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors C).
Local Definition moncat2 := Mon_endo (C:=bicat_of_cats) C.

(*
Lemma same_precategory : pr1 moncat1 = pr1 moncat2.
Proof.
  UniMath.MoreFoundations.Tactics.show_id_type.
  unfold moncat1, moncat2.
  unfold EndofunctorsMonoidal.monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors, Mon_endo.
  cbn.
The unachievable goal is then:
                  [C, C, hs] = category_from_bicat_and_ob (C,, hs)
*)


C, D, D': category
pr111 moncat1 = pr111 moncat2


C, D, D': category
pr111 moncat1 = pr111 moncat2

  apply idpath.
Qed.


C, D, D': category
pr112 moncat1 = pr112 moncat2


C, D, D': category
pr112 moncat1 = pr112 moncat2

  (* show_id_type. *)
  
C, D, D': category
pr112 (swapping_of_monoidal_cat
         (EndofunctorsMonoidal.monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors
            C)) = pr112 (Mon_endo C)

  
C, D, D': category
pr112 (swapping_of_monoidal_cat
         (monoidal_cat_from_bicat_and_ob C)) =
pr112 (swapping_of_monoidal_cat
         (monoidal_cat_from_bicat_and_ob C))

  
C, D, D': category
functor_composite_data
  (functor_composite_data
     (bindelta_functor_data
        (category_from_bicat_and_ob C
         ⊠ category_from_bicat_and_ob C))
     (pair_functor_data
        (pr2_functor (category_from_bicat_and_ob C)
           (category_from_bicat_and_ob C))
        (pr1_functor (category_from_bicat_and_ob C)
           (category_from_bicat_and_ob C))))
  (make_functor_data
     (λ ab : C ⟶ C × C ⟶ C, pr1 ab ∙ pr2 ab)
     (λ (ab1 ab2 : C ⟶ C × C ⟶ C)
      (f : precategory_binproduct_mor
             (make_precategory_ob_mor (C ⟶ C)
                (prebicat_cells
                   (((category,,
                      (λ C D : category, C ⟶ D)),,
                     (λ C : category,
                      functor_identity C),,
                     (λ (X Y Z : category) (F : X ⟶ Y)
                      (G : Y ⟶ Z), F ∙ G)),,
                    (λ (X Y : category) (F G : X ⟶ Y),
                     F ⟹ G))))
             (make_precategory_ob_mor (C ⟶ C)
                (prebicat_cells
                   (((category,,
                      (λ C D : category, C ⟶ D)),,
                     (λ C : category,
                      functor_identity C),,
                     (λ (X Y Z : category) (F : X ⟶ Y)
                      (G : Y ⟶ Z), F ∙ G)),,
                    (λ (X Y : category) (F G : X ⟶ Y),
                     F ⟹ G)))) ab1 ab2),
      nat_trans_comp (post_whisker (pr1 f) (pr2 ab1))
        (pre_whisker (pr1 ab2) (pr2 f)))) =
functor_composite_data
  (functor_composite_data
     (bindelta_functor_data
        (category_from_bicat_and_ob C
         ⊠ category_from_bicat_and_ob C))
     (pair_functor_data
        (pr2_functor (category_from_bicat_and_ob C)
           (category_from_bicat_and_ob C))
        (pr1_functor (category_from_bicat_and_ob C)
           (category_from_bicat_and_ob C))))
  (make_functor_data
     (λ ab : C ⟶ C × C ⟶ C, pr1 ab ∙ pr2 ab)
     (λ (ab1 ab2 : C ⟶ C × C ⟶ C)
      (f : precategory_binproduct_mor
             (make_precategory_ob_mor (C ⟶ C)
                (prebicat_cells
                   (((category,,
                      (λ C D : category, C ⟶ D)),,
                     (λ C : category,
                      functor_identity C),,
                     (λ (X Y Z : category) (F : X ⟶ Y)
                      (G : Y ⟶ Z), F ∙ G)),,
                    (λ (X Y : category) (F G : X ⟶ Y),
                     F ⟹ G))))
             (make_precategory_ob_mor (C ⟶ C)
                (prebicat_cells
                   (((category,,
                      (λ C D : category, C ⟶ D)),,
                     (λ C : category,
                      functor_identity C),,
                     (λ (X Y Z : category) (F : X ⟶ Y)
                      (G : Y ⟶ Z), F ∙ G)),,
                    (λ (X Y : category) (F G : X ⟶ Y),
                     F ⟹ G)))) ab1 ab2),
      nat_trans_comp (post_whisker (pr1 f) (pr2 ab1))
        (pre_whisker (pr1 ab2) (pr2 f))))

  (* UniMath.MoreFoundations.Tactics.show_id_type. *)
  
C, D, D': category
functor_composite_data
  (functor_composite_data
     (bindelta_functor_data
        (category_from_bicat_and_ob C
         ⊠ category_from_bicat_and_ob C))
     (pair_functor_data
        (pr2_functor (category_from_bicat_and_ob C)
           (category_from_bicat_and_ob C))
        (pr1_functor (category_from_bicat_and_ob C)
           (category_from_bicat_and_ob C))))
  (make_functor_data
     (λ ab : C ⟶ C × C ⟶ C, pr1 ab ∙ pr2 ab)
     (λ (ab1 ab2 : C ⟶ C × C ⟶ C)
      (f : precategory_binproduct_mor
             (make_precategory_ob_mor (C ⟶ C)
                (prebicat_cells
                   (((category,,
                      (λ C D : category, C ⟶ D)),,
                     (λ C : category,
                      functor_identity C),,
                     (λ (X Y Z : category) (F : X ⟶ Y)
                      (G : Y ⟶ Z), F ∙ G)),,
                    (λ (X Y : category) (F G : X ⟶ Y),
                     F ⟹ G))))
             (make_precategory_ob_mor (C ⟶ C)
                (prebicat_cells
                   (((category,,
                      (λ C D : category, C ⟶ D)),,
                     (λ C : category,
                      functor_identity C),,
                     (λ (X Y Z : category) (F : X ⟶ Y)
                      (G : Y ⟶ Z), F ∙ G)),,
                    (λ (X Y : category) (F G : X ⟶ Y),
                     F ⟹ G)))) ab1 ab2),
      nat_trans_comp (post_whisker (pr1 f) (pr2 ab1))
        (pre_whisker (pr1 ab2) (pr2 f)))) ~
functor_composite_data
  (functor_composite_data
     (bindelta_functor_data
        (category_from_bicat_and_ob C
         ⊠ category_from_bicat_and_ob C))
     (pair_functor_data
        (pr2_functor (category_from_bicat_and_ob C)
           (category_from_bicat_and_ob C))
        (pr1_functor (category_from_bicat_and_ob C)
           (category_from_bicat_and_ob C))))
  (make_functor_data
     (λ ab : C ⟶ C × C ⟶ C, pr1 ab ∙ pr2 ab)
     (λ (ab1 ab2 : C ⟶ C × C ⟶ C)
      (f : precategory_binproduct_mor
             (make_precategory_ob_mor (C ⟶ C)
                (prebicat_cells
                   (((category,,
                      (λ C D : category, C ⟶ D)),,
                     (λ C : category,
                      functor_identity C),,
                     (λ (X Y Z : category) (F : X ⟶ Y)
                      (G : Y ⟶ Z), F ∙ G)),,
                    (λ (X Y : category) (F G : X ⟶ Y),
                     F ⟹ G))))
             (make_precategory_ob_mor (C ⟶ C)
                (prebicat_cells
                   (((category,,
                      (λ C D : category, C ⟶ D)),,
                     (λ C : category,
                      functor_identity C),,
                     (λ (X Y Z : category) (F : X ⟶ Y)
                      (G : Y ⟶ Z), F ∙ G)),,
                    (λ (X Y : category) (F G : X ⟶ Y),
                     F ⟹ G)))) ab1 ab2),
      nat_trans_comp (post_whisker (pr1 f) (pr2 ab1))
        (pre_whisker (pr1 ab2) (pr2 f))))
C, D, D': category
∏
(C1
 C2 : precategory_binproduct_ob_mor
        (make_precategory_ob_mor (C ⟶ C)
           (prebicat_cells
              (((category,, (λ C D : category, C ⟶ D)),,
                (λ C : category, functor_identity C),,
                (λ (X Y Z : category) (F : X ⟶ Y)
                 (G : Y ⟶ Z), F ∙ G)),,
               (λ (X Y : category) (F G : X ⟶ Y),
                F ⟹ G))))
        (make_precategory_ob_mor (C ⟶ C)
           (prebicat_cells
              (((category,, (λ C D : category, C ⟶ D)),,
                (λ C : category, functor_identity C),,
                (λ (X Y Z : category) (F : X ⟶ Y)
                 (G : Y ⟶ Z), F ∙ G)),,
               (λ (X Y : category) (F G : X ⟶ Y),
                F ⟹ G)))))
(f : precategory_binproduct_ob_mor
       (make_precategory_ob_mor (C ⟶ C)
          (prebicat_cells
             (((category,, (λ C D : category, C ⟶ D)),,
               (λ C : category, functor_identity C),,
               (λ (X Y Z : category) (F : X ⟶ Y)
                (G : Y ⟶ Z), F ∙ G)),,
              (λ (X Y : category) (F G : X ⟶ Y), F ⟹ G))))
       (make_precategory_ob_mor (C ⟶ C)
          (prebicat_cells
             (((category,, (λ C D : category, C ⟶ D)),,
               (λ C : category, functor_identity C),,
               (λ (X Y Z : category) (F : X ⟶ Y)
                (G : Y ⟶ Z), F ∙ G)),,
              (λ (X Y : category) (F G : X ⟶ Y), F ⟹ G))))
     ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧),
double_transport (?H C1) (?H C2)
  (pr2
     (functor_composite_data
        (functor_composite_data
           (bindelta_functor_data
              (category_from_bicat_and_ob C
               ⊠ category_from_bicat_and_ob C))
           (pair_functor_data
              (pr2_functor
                 (category_from_bicat_and_ob C)
                 (category_from_bicat_and_ob C))
              (pr1_functor
                 (category_from_bicat_and_ob C)
                 (category_from_bicat_and_ob C))))
        (make_functor_data
           (λ ab : C ⟶ C × C ⟶ C, pr1 ab ∙ pr2 ab)
           (λ (ab1 ab2 : C ⟶ C × C ⟶ C)
            (f0 : precategory_binproduct_mor
                    (make_precategory_ob_mor (C ⟶ C)
                       (prebicat_cells
                          (((category,,
                             (λ C D : category, C ⟶ D)),,
                            (λ C : category,
                             functor_identity C),,
                            (λ (X Y Z : category)
                             (F : X ⟶ Y) (G : Y ⟶ Z),
                             F ∙ G)),,
                           (λ (X Y : category)
                            (F G : X ⟶ Y), F ⟹ G))))
                    (make_precategory_ob_mor (C ⟶ C)
                       (prebicat_cells
                          (((category,,
                             (λ C D : category, C ⟶ D)),,
                            (λ C : category,
                             functor_identity C),,
                            (λ (X Y Z : category)
                             (F : X ⟶ Y) (G : Y ⟶ Z),
                             F ∙ G)),,
                           (λ (X Y : category)
                            (F G : X ⟶ Y), F ⟹ G))))
                    ab1 ab2),
            nat_trans_comp
              (post_whisker (pr1 f0) (pr2 ab1))
              (pre_whisker (pr1 ab2) (pr2 f0))))) C1
     C2 f) =
pr2
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data
        (bindelta_functor_data
           (category_from_bicat_and_ob C
            ⊠ category_from_bicat_and_ob C))
        (pair_functor_data
           (pr2_functor (category_from_bicat_and_ob C)
              (category_from_bicat_and_ob C))
           (pr1_functor (category_from_bicat_and_ob C)
              (category_from_bicat_and_ob C))))
     (make_functor_data
        (λ ab : C ⟶ C × C ⟶ C, pr1 ab ∙ pr2 ab)
        (λ (ab1 ab2 : C ⟶ C × C ⟶ C)
         (f0 : precategory_binproduct_mor
                 (make_precategory_ob_mor (C ⟶ C)
                    (prebicat_cells
                       (((category,,
                          (λ C D : category, C ⟶ D)),,
                         (λ C : category,
                          functor_identity C),,
                         (λ (X Y Z : category)
                          (F : X ⟶ Y) (G : Y ⟶ Z),
                          F ∙ G)),,
                        (λ (X Y : category)
                         (F G : X ⟶ Y), F ⟹ G))))
                 (make_precategory_ob_mor (C ⟶ C)
                    (prebicat_cells
                       (((category,,
                          (λ C D : category, C ⟶ D)),,
                         (λ C : category,
                          functor_identity C),,
                         (λ (X Y Z : category)
                          (F : X ⟶ Y) (G : Y ⟶ Z),
                          F ∙ G)),,
                        (λ (X Y : category)
                         (F G : X ⟶ Y), F ⟹ G)))) ab1
                 ab2),
         nat_trans_comp
           (post_whisker (pr1 f0) (pr2 ab1))
           (pre_whisker (pr1 ab2) (pr2 f0))))) C1 C2 f

functor_composite_data
  (functor_composite_data

C, D, D': category
x: precategory_binproduct_ob_mor
  (make_precategory_ob_mor (C ⟶ C)
     (prebicat_cells
        (((category,, (λ C D : category, C ⟶ D)),,
          (λ C : category, functor_identity C),,
          (λ (X Y Z : category) (F : X ⟶ Y)
           (G : Y ⟶ Z), F ∙ G)),,
         (λ (X Y : category) (F G : X ⟶ Y), F ⟹ G))))
  (make_precategory_ob_mor (C ⟶ C)
     (prebicat_cells
        (((category,, (λ C D : category, C ⟶ D)),,
          (λ C : category, functor_identity C),,
          (λ (X Y Z : category) (F : X ⟶ Y)
           (G : Y ⟶ Z), F ∙ G)),,
         (λ (X Y : category) (F G : X ⟶ Y), F ⟹ G))))
pr2 x ∙ pr1 x = pr2 x ∙ pr1 x

  (* The goal is then: pr2 x ∙ pr1 = pr2 x ∙ pr1 x *)
    apply idpath.
  
C, D, D': category
∏
(C1
 C2 : precategory_binproduct_ob_mor
        (make_precategory_ob_mor (C ⟶ C)
           (prebicat_cells
              (((category,, (λ C D : category, C ⟶ D)),,
                (λ C : category, functor_identity C),,
                (λ (X Y Z : category) (F : X ⟶ Y)
                 (G : Y ⟶ Z), F ∙ G)),,

                 (G : Y ⟶ Z), F ∙ G)),,

                F ⟹ G)))))
(f : precategory_binproduct_ob_mor
       (make_precategory_ob_mor (C ⟶ C)
          (prebicat_cells
             (((category,, (λ C D : category, C ⟶ D)),,

                (G : Y ⟶ Z), F ∙ G)),,

     ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧),
double_transport
  (((λ x : precategory_binproduct_ob_mor
             (make_precategory_ob_mor (C ⟶ C)
                (prebicat_cells
                   (((category,,
                      (λ C D : category, C ⟶ D)),,

     functor_composite_data

                          (λ C D : category, C ⟶ D)),,
                         (λ C : category,
                          functor_identity C),,
                         (λ (X Y Z : category)
                          (F : X ⟶ Y) (G : Y ⟶ Z),
                          F ∙ G)),,
                        (λ (X Y : category)
                         (F G : X ⟶ Y), F ⟹ G)))) ab1
                 ab2),
          nat_trans_comp
            (post_whisker (pr1 f) (pr2 ab1))
            (pre_whisker (pr1 ab2) (pr2 f))))) C2)
  (pr2
     (functor_composite_data
        (functor_composite_data
           (bindelta_functor_data
              (category_from_bicat_and_ob C
               ⊠ category_from_bicat_and_ob C))
           (pair_functor_data
              (pr2_functor
                 (category_from_bicat_and_ob C)
                 (category_from_bicat_and_ob C))
              (pr1_functor
                 (category_from_bicat_and_ob C)
                 (category_from_bicat_and_ob C))))
        (make_functor_data
           (λ ab : C ⟶ C × C ⟶ C, pr1 ab ∙ pr2 ab)
           (λ (ab1 ab2 : C ⟶ C × C ⟶ C)
            (f : precategory_binproduct_mor
                   (make_precategory_ob_mor (C ⟶ C)
                      (prebicat_cells
                         (((category,,
                            (λ C D : category, C ⟶ D)),,
                           (λ C : category,
                            functor_identity C),,
                           (λ (X Y Z : category)
                            (F : X ⟶ Y) (G : Y ⟶ Z),
                            F ∙ G)),,
                          (λ (X Y : category)
                           (F G : X ⟶ Y), F ⟹ G))))
                   (make_precategory_ob_mor (C ⟶ C)
                      (prebicat_cells
                         (((category,,
                            (λ C D : category, C ⟶ D)),,
                           (λ C : category,
                            functor_identity C),,
                           (λ (X Y Z : category)
                            (F : X ⟶ Y) (G : Y ⟶ Z),
                            F ∙ G)),,
                          (λ (X Y : category)
                           (F G : X ⟶ Y), F ⟹ G))))
                   ab1 ab2),
            nat_trans_comp
              (post_whisker (pr1 f) (pr2 ab1))
              (pre_whisker (pr1 ab2) (pr2 f))))) C1 C2
     f) =
pr2
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data
        (bindelta_functor_data
           (category_from_bicat_and_ob C
            ⊠ category_from_bicat_and_ob C))
        (pair_functor_data
           (pr2_functor (category_from_bicat_and_ob C)
              (category_from_bicat_and_ob C))
           (pr1_functor (category_from_bicat_and_ob C)
              (category_from_bicat_and_ob C))))
     (make_functor_data
        (λ ab : C ⟶ C × C ⟶ C, pr1 ab ∙ pr2 ab)
        (λ (ab1 ab2 : C ⟶ C × C ⟶ C)
         (f : precategory_binproduct_mor
                (make_precategory_ob_mor (C ⟶ C)
                   (prebicat_cells
                      (((category,,
                         (λ C D : category, C ⟶ D)),,
                        (λ C : category,
                         functor_identity C),,
                        (λ (X Y Z : category)
                         (F : X ⟶ Y) (G : Y ⟶ Z),
                         F ∙ G)),,
                       (λ (X Y : category)
                        (F G : X ⟶ Y), F ⟹ G))))
                (make_precategory_ob_mor (C ⟶ C)
                   (prebicat_cells
                      (((category,,
                         (λ C D : category, C ⟶ D)),,
                        (λ C : category,
                         functor_identity C),,
                        (λ (X Y Z : category)
                         (F : X ⟶ Y) (G : Y ⟶ Z),
                         F ∙ G)),,
                       (λ (X Y : category)
                        (F G : X ⟶ Y), F ⟹ G)))) ab1
                ab2),
         nat_trans_comp
           (post_whisker (pr1 f) (pr2 ab1))
           (pre_whisker (pr1 ab2) (pr2 f))))) C1 C2 f
 
C, D, D': category
C1, C2: precategory_binproduct_ob_mor
  (make_precategory_ob_mor (C ⟶ C)
     (prebicat_cells
        (((category,, (λ C D : category, C ⟶ D)),,
          (λ C : category, functor_identity C),,
          (λ (X Y Z : category) (F : X ⟶ Y)
           (G : Y ⟶ Z), F ∙ G)),,
         (λ (X Y : category) (F G : X ⟶ Y), F ⟹ G))))
  (make_precategory_ob_mor (C ⟶ C)
     (prebicat_cells
        (((category,, (λ C D : category, C ⟶ D)),,
          (λ C : category, functor_identity C),,
          (λ (X Y Z : category) (F : X ⟶ Y)
           (G : Y ⟶ Z), F ∙ G)),,
         (λ (X Y : category) (F G : X ⟶ Y), F ⟹ G))))
f: precategory_binproduct_ob_mor
  (make_precategory_ob_mor (C ⟶ C)
     (prebicat_cells
        (((category,, (λ C D : category, C ⟶ D)),,
          (λ C : category, functor_identity C),,
          (λ (X Y Z : category) (F : X ⟶ Y)
           (G : Y ⟶ Z), F ∙ G)),,
         (λ (X Y : category) (F G : X ⟶ Y), F ⟹ G))))
  (make_precategory_ob_mor (C ⟶ C)
     (prebicat_cells
        (((category,, (λ C D : category, C ⟶ D)),,
          (λ C : category, functor_identity C),,
          (λ (X Y Z : category) (F : X ⟶ Y)
           (G : Y ⟶ Z), F ∙ G)),,
         (λ (X Y : category) (F G : X ⟶ Y), F ⟹ G))))
⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
nat_trans_comp (post_whisker (pr2 f) (pr1 C1))
  (pre_whisker (pr2 C2) (pr1 f)) =
nat_trans_comp (post_whisker (pr2 f) (pr1 C1))
  (pre_whisker (pr2 C2) (pr1 f))
 apply idpath.
Qed.

(* cannot be typechecked any longer
Lemma same_I : pr222 moncat1 = pr222 moncat2.
 *)

Local Definition Mon_endo' : monoidal_cat := swapping_of_monoidal_cat (monoidal_cat_of_pointedfunctors C).
Local Definition domain_action : action Mon_endo' (hom(C:=bicat_of_cats) C D')
    := ab_strength_domain_action(C:=bicat_of_cats) C D' forget.
Local Definition target_action : action Mon_endo' (hom(C:=bicat_of_cats) C D)
    := ab_strength_target_action(C:=bicat_of_cats) C D forget.


Section Signature_From_ActionBased_Strength.

Section IndividualFunctorsWithABStrength.

  Context (H : functor [C, D'] [C, D]).


  Definition ab_strength_for_functors_and_pointed_functors : UU
    := ab_strength_on_homs_in_bicat(C:=bicat_of_cats) C D D' forget H.

  Definition ab_strength_for_functors_and_pointed_functors_to_actionbased_strength
             (ab_str : ab_strength_for_functors_and_pointed_functors) :
    actionbased_strength (swapping_of_monoidal_cat (monoidal_cat_of_pointedfunctors C))
                         (ab_strength_domain_action(C:=bicat_of_cats) C D' forget)
                         (ab_strength_target_action(C:=bicat_of_cats) C D forget) H
    := ab_str.
  Coercion ab_strength_for_functors_and_pointed_functors_to_actionbased_strength :
    ab_strength_for_functors_and_pointed_functors >-> actionbased_strength.

  Context (ab_str : ab_strength_for_functors_and_pointed_functors).

  (* adapt typing of [pr1 ab_str] for use in [Signature] *)
  
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
ab_str: ab_strength_for_functors_and_pointed_functors
nat_trans_data (θ_source H) (θ_target H)

  
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
ab_str: ab_strength_for_functors_and_pointed_functors
nat_trans_data (θ_source H) (θ_target H)

ab_str: ab_strength_for_functors_and_pointed_functors
x: [C, D'] ⊠ category_Ptd C
[C, D] ⟦ θ_source H x, θ_target H x ⟧

    
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
ab_str: ab_strength_for_functors_and_pointed_functors
x: [C, D'] ⊠ category_Ptd C
result:= ab_str x
:
functor_composite_data (pr12 x)
  (pr1 (pr1 H (pr1 x)))
⟹ pr1
    (pr1 H (functor_compose (pr12 x) (pr1 x))): functor_composite_data (pr12 x)
  (pr1 (pr1 H (pr1 x)))
⟹ pr1
    (pr1 H (functor_compose (pr12 x) (pr1 x)))
[C, D] ⟦ θ_source H x, θ_target H x ⟧

    exact result.
  Defined.

  
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
ab_str: ab_strength_for_functors_and_pointed_functors
is_nat_trans (θ_source H) (θ_target H)
  θ_for_signature_nat_trans_data

  
C, D, D': category

ab_str: ab_strength_for_functors_and_pointed_functors
is_nat_trans (θ_source H) (θ_target H)
  θ_for_signature_nat_trans_data

    
C, D, D': category

x, x': [C, D'] ⊠ category_Ptd C
f: [C, D'] ⊠ category_Ptd C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
# (θ_source H) f · θ_for_signature_nat_trans_data x' =
θ_for_signature_nat_trans_data x · # (θ_target H) f

    (* UniMath.MoreFoundations.Tactics.show_id_type. *)
    
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
ab_str: ab_strength_for_functors_and_pointed_functors
x, x': [C, D'] ⊠ category_Ptd C
f: [C, D'] ⊠ category_Ptd C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
∏ x0 : C,

  x0 =
(θ_for_signature_nat_trans_data x · # (θ_target H) f)
  x0

    
C, D, D': category

x, x': [C, D'] ⊠ category_Ptd C
f: [C, D'] ⊠ category_Ptd C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
c: C
(# (θ_source H) f · θ_for_signature_nat_trans_data x')
  c =

C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
ab_str: ab_strength_for_functors_and_pointed_functors
x, x': [C, D'] ⊠ category_Ptd C
f: [C, D'] ⊠ category_Ptd C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
c: C
# (pr1 (H (pr1 x))) ((pr112 f) c)
· pr1 (# H (pr1 f)) (pr1 (pr12 x') c)
· θ_for_signature_nat_trans_data x' c =
θ_for_signature_nat_trans_data x c
· # H
    (nat_trans_comp
       (post_whisker_in_funcat C C D' (pr12 f) (pr1 x))
       (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C D' (pr12 x') (pr1 f)))
    c

    
C, D, D': category

x, x': [C, D'] ⊠ category_Ptd C

c: C
Heq: # (actionbased_strength_dom
     (swapping_of_monoidal_cat
        (monoidal_cat_of_pointedfunctors C))
     (ab_strength_target_action C D forget) H) f
· ab_str x' =
ab_str x
· # (actionbased_strength_codom
       (swapping_of_monoidal_cat
          (monoidal_cat_of_pointedfunctors C))
       (ab_strength_domain_action C D' forget) H)
    f
# (pr1 (H (pr1 x))) ((pr112 f) c)
· pr1 (# H (pr1 f)) (pr1 (pr12 x') c)
· θ_for_signature_nat_trans_data x' c =
θ_for_signature_nat_trans_data x c
· # H
    (nat_trans_comp
       (post_whisker_in_funcat C C D' (pr12 f) (pr1 x))
       (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C D' (pr12 x') (pr1 f)))
    c

      (ab_strength_target_action C D forget) H)
   f · ab_str x') c =
(ab_str x
 · # (actionbased_strength_codom
        (swapping_of_monoidal_cat
           (monoidal_cat_of_pointedfunctors C))
        (ab_strength_domain_action C D' forget)
        H) f) c
# (pr1 (H (pr1 x))) ((pr112 f) c)
· pr1 (# H (pr1 f)) (pr1 (pr12 x') c)
· θ_for_signature_nat_trans_data x' c =
θ_for_signature_nat_trans_data x c
· # H
    (nat_trans_comp
       (post_whisker_in_funcat C C D' (pr12 f) (pr1 x))
       (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C D' (pr12 x') (pr1 f)))
    c

   f · ab_str x') c =

x, x': [C, D'] ⊠ category_Ptd C

       (post_whisker (pr12 f) (pr1 x))
       (pre_whisker (pr12 x') (pr1 f))) c

· # H
    (nat_trans_comp

       (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C D' (pr12 x') (pr1 f)))
    c

    exact Heqc.
  Qed.

  Definition θ_for_signature : θ_source H ⟹ θ_target H
    := (θ_for_signature_nat_trans_data,,θ_for_signature_is_nat_trans).

  
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
ab_str: ab_strength_for_functors_and_pointed_functors
θ_Strength1_int θ_for_signature

  
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
ab_str: ab_strength_for_functors_and_pointed_functors
θ_Strength1_int θ_for_signature

    
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
ab_str: ab_strength_for_functors_and_pointed_functors
∏ X : [C, D'],
θ_for_signature (X, id_Ptd C)
· # H
    (BicatOfCatsElementary.lunitor_CAT
       (pr2
          (binswap_pair_functor
             (pair_functor (functor_identity [C, D'])
                (functor_ptd_forget C) (X, id_Ptd C))))) =
BicatOfCatsElementary.lunitor_CAT
  (pr2
     (binswap_pair_functor
        (pair_functor H (functor_ptd_forget C)
           (X, id_Ptd C))))
 
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
ab_str: ab_strength_for_functors_and_pointed_functors
X: [C, D']
θ_for_signature (X, id_Ptd C)
· # H
    (BicatOfCatsElementary.lunitor_CAT
       (pr2
          (binswap_pair_functor
             (pair_functor (functor_identity [C, D'])
                (functor_ptd_forget C) (X, id_Ptd C))))) =
BicatOfCatsElementary.lunitor_CAT
  (pr2
     (binswap_pair_functor
        (pair_functor H (functor_ptd_forget C)
           (X, id_Ptd C))))

    
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
ab_str: ab_strength_for_functors_and_pointed_functors
X: [C, D']
∏ x : C,
(θ_for_signature (X, id_Ptd C)
 · # H
     (BicatOfCatsElementary.lunitor_CAT
        (pr2
           (binswap_pair_functor
              (pair_functor (functor_identity [C, D'])
                 (functor_ptd_forget C) (X, id_Ptd C))))))
  x =
BicatOfCatsElementary.lunitor_CAT
  (pr2
     (binswap_pair_functor
        (pair_functor H (functor_ptd_forget C)
           (X, id_Ptd C)))) x

    
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
ab_str: ab_strength_for_functors_and_pointed_functors
X: [C, D']
c: C
(θ_for_signature (X, id_Ptd C)
 · # H
     (BicatOfCatsElementary.lunitor_CAT
        (pr2
           (binswap_pair_functor
              (pair_functor (functor_identity [C, D'])
                 (functor_ptd_forget C) (X, id_Ptd C))))))
  c =
BicatOfCatsElementary.lunitor_CAT

C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
ab_str: ab_strength_for_functors_and_pointed_functors
X: [C, D']
c: C
θ_for_signature_nat_trans_data (X, id_Ptd C) c
· # H (BicatOfCatsElementary.lunitor_CAT X) c =
id₁ (H X c)

    
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
ab_str: ab_strength_for_functors_and_pointed_functors
X: [C, D']
c: C
HypX: ab_str
  (X,,
   monoidal_cat_unit
     (swapping_of_monoidal_cat
        (monoidal_cat_of_pointedfunctors C)))
• # H
    ((strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_inv forget ▹ X)
     • lunitor X) =
(strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_inv forget ▹ H X)
• lunitor (H X)
θ_for_signature_nat_trans_data (X, id_Ptd C) c
· # H (BicatOfCatsElementary.lunitor_CAT X) c =
id₁ (H X c)

    
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
ab_str: ab_strength_for_functors_and_pointed_functors
X: [C, D']
c: C
HypX: ab_str
  (X,,
   monoidal_cat_unit
     (swapping_of_monoidal_cat
        (monoidal_cat_of_pointedfunctors C)))
• # H
    ((strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_inv forget ▹ X)
     • lunitor X) =
(strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_inv forget ▹ H X)
• lunitor (H X)
Heqc: (ab_str
   (X,,
    monoidal_cat_unit
      (swapping_of_monoidal_cat
         (monoidal_cat_of_pointedfunctors C)))
 • # H
     ((strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_inv forget ▹ X)
      • lunitor X)) c =
((strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_inv forget ▹ H X)
 • lunitor (H X)) c
θ_for_signature_nat_trans_data (X, id_Ptd C) c
· # H (BicatOfCatsElementary.lunitor_CAT X) c =
id₁ (H X c)

    
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
ab_str: ab_strength_for_functors_and_pointed_functors
X: [C, D']
c: C
HypX: ab_str
  (X,,
   monoidal_cat_unit
     (swapping_of_monoidal_cat
        (monoidal_cat_of_pointedfunctors C)))
• # H
    ((strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_inv forget ▹ X)
     • lunitor X) =
(strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_inv forget ▹ H X)
• lunitor (H X)
Heqc: ab_str (X,, id_Ptd C) c
· # H
    (nat_trans_comp
       (post_whisker
          (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv
             (make_nat_z_iso
                (functor_identity C)
                (functor_identity C)
                (nat_trans_id
                   (functor_identity_data C))
                (is_nat_z_iso_nat_trans_id
                   (functor_identity_data C))))
          X) (nat_trans_id X)) c =
# (pr1 (H X)) (id₁ c) · id₁ (H X c)
θ_for_signature_nat_trans_data (X, id_Ptd C) c
· # H (BicatOfCatsElementary.lunitor_CAT X) c =
id₁ (H X c)

  (X,,
   monoidal_cat_unit
     (swapping_of_monoidal_cat
        (monoidal_cat_of_pointedfunctors C)))
• # H
    ((strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_inv forget ▹ X)
     • lunitor X) =
(strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_inv forget ▹ H X)
• lunitor (H X)

· # H
    (nat_trans_comp
       (post_whisker
          (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv
             (make_nat_z_iso
                (functor_identity C)
                (functor_identity C)
                (nat_trans_id
                   (functor_identity_data C))
                (is_nat_z_iso_nat_trans_id
                   (functor_identity_data C))))
          X) (nat_trans_id X)) c =

θ_for_signature_nat_trans_data (X, id_Ptd C) c
· # H (BicatOfCatsElementary.lunitor_CAT X) c =
# (pr1 (H X)) (id₁ c) · id₁ (pr1 (pr1 H X) c)

BicatOfCatsElementary.lunitor_CAT X x =

  (post_whisker
     (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv
        (make_nat_z_iso (functor_identity C)
           (functor_identity C)

              (functor_identity_data C)))) X)
  (nat_trans_id X) x

  (nat_trans_id X) c

C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
ab_str: ab_strength_for_functors_and_pointed_functors
X: [C, D']
Z, Z': category_Ptd C
c: C
UU

  
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
ab_str: ab_strength_for_functors_and_pointed_functors
X: [C, D']
Z, Z': category_Ptd C
c: C

C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
ab_str: ab_strength_for_functors_and_pointed_functors
X: [C, D']
Z, Z': category_Ptd C
c: C
[C, D']
⟦ act_odot (ab_strength_domain_action C D' forget)
    (X,, PointedFunctorsComposition.ptd_compose C Z Z'),
functorial_composition C C D'
  (binswap_pair_functor
     (pair_functor (functor_identity [C, D'])
        (functor_ptd_forget C)
        (functor_compose (pr1 Z') X, Z))) ⟧

           exact (nat_trans_comp
                    (post_whisker (nat_trans_id _) _)
                    (nat_trans_id _)).
  Defined.

  
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
ab_str: ab_strength_for_functors_and_pointed_functors
X: [C, D']
Z, Z': category_Ptd C
c: C
test X Z Z' c

  
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
ab_str: ab_strength_for_functors_and_pointed_functors
X: [C, D']
Z, Z': category_Ptd C
c: C
test X Z Z' c

    
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
ab_str: ab_strength_for_functors_and_pointed_functors
X: [C, D']
Z, Z': category_Ptd C
c: C
id₁
  (pr1 (H X)
     (pr1
        (binswap_pair_functor
           (pair_functor
              (functor_identity
                 (ActionOfEndomorphismsInBicat.homcat
                    C D)) forget
              (pair_functor H
                 (functor_identity
                    (swapping_of_monoidal_cat
                       (monoidal_cat_of_pointedfunctors
                          C)))
                 (X,,
                  PointedFunctorsComposition.ptd_compose
                    C Z Z')))) c))
· # (pr1 (H X))
    (id₁
       (pr1
          (binswap_pair_functor
             (pair_functor
                (functor_identity
                   (ActionOfEndomorphismsInBicat.homcat
                      C D)) forget
                (pair_functor H
                   (functor_identity
                      (swapping_of_monoidal_cat
                         (monoidal_cat_of_pointedfunctors
                            C)))
                   (X,,
                    PointedFunctorsComposition.ptd_compose
                      C Z Z')))) c))
· pr1
    (ab_str
       (X,,
        PointedFunctorsComposition.ptd_compose C Z Z'))
    c
· pr1
    (# H
       (nat_trans_comp
          (post_whisker
             (nat_trans_id
                (pr1
                   (binswap_pair_functor
                      (pair_functor
                         (functor_identity
                            (ActionOfEndomorphismsInBicat.homcat
                               C D')) forget
                         (X,,
                          PointedFunctorsComposition.ptd_compose
                            C Z Z')))))
             (pr2
                (binswap_pair_functor
                   (pair_functor
                      (functor_identity
                         (ActionOfEndomorphismsInBicat.homcat
                            C D')) forget
                      (X,,
                       PointedFunctorsComposition.ptd_compose
                         C Z Z')))))
          (nat_trans_id
             (functor_composite_data
                (pr1
                   (binswap_pair_functor
                      (pair_functor
                         (functor_identity
                            (ActionOfEndomorphismsInBicat.homcat
                               C D')) forget
                         (X,,
                          PointedFunctorsComposition.ptd_compose
                            C Z Z'))))
                (pr2
                   (binswap_pair_functor
                      (pair_functor
                         (functor_identity
                            (ActionOfEndomorphismsInBicat.homcat
                               C D')) forget
                         (X,,
                          PointedFunctorsComposition.ptd_compose
                            C Z Z')))))))) c =
pr1 (θ_for_signature_nat_trans_data (X, Z'))
  ((pr111 Z) c)
· pr1
    (θ_for_signature_nat_trans_data
       (functor_compose (pr1 Z') X, Z)) c

    
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
ab_str: ab_strength_for_functors_and_pointed_functors
X: [C, D']
Z, Z': category_Ptd C
c: C
id₁ (pr1 (H X) (pr1 Z' (pr1 Z c)))
· # (pr1 (H X)) (id₁ (pr1 Z' (pr1 Z c)))
· pr1
    (ab_str
       (X,,
        PointedFunctorsComposition.ptd_compose C Z Z'))
    c
· pr1
    (# H
       (nat_trans_comp
          (post_whisker
             (nat_trans_id
                (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z)
                   (pr1 Z'))) X)
          (nat_trans_id
             (functor_composite_data
                (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z)
                   (pr1 Z')) X)))) c =
pr1 (θ_for_signature_nat_trans_data (X, Z'))
  ((pr111 Z) c)
· pr1
    (θ_for_signature_nat_trans_data
       (functor_compose (pr1 Z') X, Z)) c

    
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
ab_str: ab_strength_for_functors_and_pointed_functors
X: [C, D']
Z, Z': category_Ptd C
c: C
HypX: ((lassociator (forget Z) (forget Z') (H X)
  • (lax_monoidal_functor_μ forget (Z',, Z)
     ▹ H X))
 • ab_str
     (X,,
      monoidal_cat_tensor
        (swapping_of_monoidal_cat
           (monoidal_cat_of_pointedfunctors C))
        (Z', Z)))
• # H
    ((μ_UZ'Zinv C forget Z' Z ▹ X)
     • rassociator (forget Z) (forget Z') X) =
(forget Z ◃ ab_str (X,, Z'))
• ab_str (forget Z' · X,, Z)
id₁ (pr1 (H X) (pr1 Z' (pr1 Z c)))
· # (pr1 (H X)) (id₁ (pr1 Z' (pr1 Z c)))
· pr1
    (ab_str
       (X,,
        PointedFunctorsComposition.ptd_compose C Z Z'))
    c
· pr1
    (# H
       (nat_trans_comp
          (post_whisker
             (nat_trans_id
                (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z)
                   (pr1 Z'))) X)
          (nat_trans_id
             (functor_composite_data
                (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z)
                   (pr1 Z')) X)))) c =
pr1 (θ_for_signature_nat_trans_data (X, Z'))
  ((pr111 Z) c)
· pr1
    (θ_for_signature_nat_trans_data
       (functor_compose (pr1 Z') X, Z)) c

    
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
ab_str: ab_strength_for_functors_and_pointed_functors
X: [C, D']
Z, Z': category_Ptd C
c: C
HypX: ((lassociator (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z') (H X)
  • (nat_trans_id
       (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z'))
     ▹ H X))
 • ab_str
     (X,,
      PointedFunctorsComposition.ptd_compose C
        Z Z'))
• # H
    ((μ_UZ'Zinv C forget Z' Z ▹ X)
     • rassociator (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z') X) =
(pr1 Z ◃ ab_str (X,, Z'))
• ab_str (pr1 Z' · X,, Z)
id₁ (pr1 (H X) (pr1 Z' (pr1 Z c)))
· # (pr1 (H X)) (id₁ (pr1 Z' (pr1 Z c)))
· pr1
    (ab_str
       (X,,
        PointedFunctorsComposition.ptd_compose C Z Z'))
    c
· pr1
    (# H
       (nat_trans_comp
          (post_whisker
             (nat_trans_id
                (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z)
                   (pr1 Z'))) X)
          (nat_trans_id
             (functor_composite_data
                (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z)
                   (pr1 Z')) X)))) c =
pr1 (θ_for_signature_nat_trans_data (X, Z'))
  ((pr111 Z) c)
· pr1
    (θ_for_signature_nat_trans_data
       (functor_compose (pr1 Z') X, Z)) c

    exact (nat_trans_eq_pointwise HypX c).
  Qed.

  
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
ab_str: ab_strength_for_functors_and_pointed_functors
θ_Strength2_int θ_for_signature

  
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
ab_str: ab_strength_for_functors_and_pointed_functors
θ_Strength2_int θ_for_signature

    
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
ab_str: ab_strength_for_functors_and_pointed_functors
X: [C, D']
Z, Z': category_Ptd C
θ_for_signature
  (X, PointedFunctorsComposition.ptd_compose C Z Z')
· # H
    (BicatOfCatsElementary.rassociator_CAT
       (functor_ptd_forget C Z)
       (functor_ptd_forget C Z') X) =
BicatOfCatsElementary.lassociator_CAT
  (functor_ptd_forget C Z) (functor_ptd_forget C Z')
  (H X)
· # (pre_composition_functor_data C C D
       (functor_ptd_forget C Z))
    (θ_for_signature (X, Z'))
· θ_for_signature
    (functor_compose (functor_ptd_forget C Z') X, Z)

ab_str: ab_strength_for_functors_and_pointed_functors
X: [C, D']
Z, Z': category_Ptd C
∏ x : C,
(θ_for_signature
   (X, PointedFunctorsComposition.ptd_compose C Z Z')
 · # H
     (BicatOfCatsElementary.rassociator_CAT
        (functor_ptd_forget C Z)
        (functor_ptd_forget C Z') X)) x =
(BicatOfCatsElementary.lassociator_CAT
   (functor_ptd_forget C Z) (functor_ptd_forget C Z')
   (H X)
 · # (pre_composition_functor_data C C D
        (functor_ptd_forget C Z))
     (θ_for_signature (X, Z'))
 · θ_for_signature
     (functor_compose (functor_ptd_forget C Z') X, Z))
  x

ab_str: ab_strength_for_functors_and_pointed_functors

C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
ab_str: ab_strength_for_functors_and_pointed_functors
X: [C, D']
Z, Z': category_Ptd C
c: C
?t1 =
# (pre_composition_functor_data C C D
     (functor_ptd_forget C Z))
  (θ_for_signature (X, Z')) c
· θ_for_signature
    (functor_compose (functor_ptd_forget C Z') X, Z) c

         exact (test' X Z Z' c).
    
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
ab_str: ab_strength_for_functors_and_pointed_functors
X: [C, D']
Z, Z': category_Ptd C
c: C
(θ_for_signature
   (X, PointedFunctorsComposition.ptd_compose C Z Z')
 · # H
     (BicatOfCatsElementary.rassociator_CAT
        (functor_ptd_forget C Z)
        (functor_ptd_forget C Z') X)) c =
BicatOfCatsElementary.lassociator_CAT
  (functor_ptd_forget C Z) (functor_ptd_forget C Z')
  (H X) c
· (id₁
     (pr1 (H X)
        (pr1
           (binswap_pair_functor
              (pair_functor
                 (functor_identity
                    (ActionOfEndomorphismsInBicat.homcat
                       C D)) forget
                 (pair_functor H
                    (functor_identity
                       (swapping_of_monoidal_cat
                          (monoidal_cat_of_pointedfunctors
                             C)))
                    (X,,
                     PointedFunctorsComposition.ptd_compose
                       C Z Z')))) c))
   · # (pr1 (H X))
       (id₁
          (pr1
             (binswap_pair_functor
                (pair_functor
                   (functor_identity
                      (ActionOfEndomorphismsInBicat.homcat
                         C D)) forget
                   (pair_functor H
                      (functor_identity
                         (swapping_of_monoidal_cat
                            (monoidal_cat_of_pointedfunctors
                               C)))
                      (X,,
                       PointedFunctorsComposition.ptd_compose
                         C Z Z')))) c))
   · pr1
       (ab_str
          (X,,
           PointedFunctorsComposition.ptd_compose C Z
             Z')) c
   · pr1
       (# H
          (nat_trans_comp
             (post_whisker
                (nat_trans_id
                   (pr1
                      (binswap_pair_functor
                         (pair_functor
                            (functor_identity
                               (ActionOfEndomorphismsInBicat.homcat
                                  C D')) forget
                            (X,,
                             PointedFunctorsComposition.ptd_compose
                               C Z Z')))))
                (pr2
                   (binswap_pair_functor
                      (pair_functor
                         (functor_identity
                            (ActionOfEndomorphismsInBicat.homcat
                               C D')) forget
                         (X,,
                          PointedFunctorsComposition.ptd_compose
                            C Z Z')))))
             (nat_trans_id
                (functor_composite_data
                   (pr1
                      (binswap_pair_functor
                         (pair_functor
                            (functor_identity
                               (ActionOfEndomorphismsInBicat.homcat
                                  C D')) forget
                            (X,,
                             PointedFunctorsComposition.ptd_compose
                               C Z Z'))))
                   (pr2
                      (binswap_pair_functor
                         (pair_functor
                            (functor_identity
                               (ActionOfEndomorphismsInBicat.homcat
                                  C D')) forget
                            (X,,
                             PointedFunctorsComposition.ptd_compose
                               C Z Z')))))))) c)

    
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
ab_str: ab_strength_for_functors_and_pointed_functors
X: [C, D']
Z, Z': category_Ptd C
c: C
θ_for_signature_nat_trans_data
  (X, PointedFunctorsComposition.ptd_compose C Z Z') c
· # H
    (BicatOfCatsElementary.rassociator_CAT (pr1 Z)
       (pr1 Z') X) c =
id₁ (H X (pr1 Z' (pr1 Z c)))
· (id₁ (pr1 (H X) (pr1 Z' (pr1 Z c)))
   · # (pr1 (H X)) (id₁ (pr1 Z' (pr1 Z c)))
   · pr1
       (ab_str
          (X,,
           PointedFunctorsComposition.ptd_compose C Z
             Z')) c
   · pr1
       (# H
          (nat_trans_comp
             (post_whisker
                (nat_trans_id
                   (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z)
                      (pr1 Z'))) X)
             (nat_trans_id
                (functor_composite_data
                   (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z)
                      (pr1 Z')) X)))) c)

X: [C, D']
Z, Z': category_Ptd C
c: C
θ_for_signature_nat_trans_data
  (X, PointedFunctorsComposition.ptd_compose C Z Z') c
· # H
    (BicatOfCatsElementary.rassociator_CAT (pr1 Z)
       (pr1 Z') X) c = ?b
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
ab_str: ab_strength_for_functors_and_pointed_functors
X: [C, D']

?b =

· (id₁ (pr1 (H X) (pr1 Z' (pr1 Z c)))
   · # (pr1 (H X)) (id₁ (pr1 Z' (pr1 Z c)))
   · pr1
       (ab_str
          (X,,
           PointedFunctorsComposition.ptd_compose C Z
             Z')) c
   · pr1
       (# H
          (nat_trans_comp
             (post_whisker
                (nat_trans_id
                   (functor_composite_data 
                      (pr1 Z) 
                      (pr1 Z'))) X)
             (nat_trans_id

id₁ (H X (pr1 Z' (pr1 Z c)))

    c

H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
ab_str: ab_strength_for_functors_and_pointed_functors
X: [C, D']
Z, Z': category_Ptd C
c: C
id₁ (pr1 (H X) (pr1 Z' (pr1 Z c)))
· # (pr1 (H X)) (id₁ (pr1 Z' (pr1 Z c)))
· pr1
    (ab_str
       (X,,
        PointedFunctorsComposition.ptd_compose C Z Z'))
    c = ?f

C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
ab_str: ab_strength_for_functors_and_pointed_functors
X: [C, D']
Z, Z': category_Ptd C
c: C
θ_for_signature_nat_trans_data
  (X, PointedFunctorsComposition.ptd_compose C Z Z') c
· # H
    (BicatOfCatsElementary.rassociator_CAT (pr1 Z)
       (pr1 Z') X) c =
pr1
  (ab_str
     (X,,
      PointedFunctorsComposition.ptd_compose C Z Z'))
  c
· pr1
    (# H
       (nat_trans_comp
          (post_whisker
             (nat_trans_id
                (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z)
                   (pr1 Z'))) X)
          (nat_trans_id
             (functor_composite_data
                (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z)
                   (pr1 Z')) X)))) c

  c
· pr1

                   (pr1 Z'))) X)

BicatOfCatsElementary.rassociator_CAT (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z')
  X =
nat_trans_comp

     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z'))) X)

BicatOfCatsElementary.rassociator_CAT (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z')
  X x =
nat_trans_comp
  (post_whisker
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z'))) X)
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data

Z, Z': category_Ptd C

nat_trans_comp
  (post_whisker
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z'))) X)
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data
