  c = ?b

         apply id_right. 
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
ab_str: ab_strength_for_functors_and_pointed_functors
X: [C, D']
Z, Z': category_Ptd C
c: C
BicatOfCatsElementary.rassociator_CAT (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z')
  X c =
post_whisker
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z'))) X c

      
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
ab_str: ab_strength_for_functors_and_pointed_functors
X: [C, D']
Z, Z': category_Ptd C
c: C
post_whisker
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z'))) X c =
BicatOfCatsElementary.rassociator_CAT (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z')
  X c

      
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
ab_str: ab_strength_for_functors_and_pointed_functors
X: [C, D']
Z, Z': category_Ptd C
c: C
# (pr1 X) (id₁ (pr1 Z' (pr1 Z c))) =
id₁ (X (pr1 Z' (pr1 Z c)))

      apply functor_id.
  Qed.

  
C, D, D': category

Signature C D D'

Signature C D D'

StrengthForSignature H

    
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
ab_str: ab_strength_for_functors_and_pointed_functors
θ_Strength1_int θ_for_signature
× θ_Strength2_int θ_for_signature

H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
ab_str: ab_strength_for_functors_and_pointed_functors
θ_Strength1_int θ_for_signature
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
ab_str: ab_strength_for_functors_and_pointed_functors
θ_Strength2_int θ_for_signature

    
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
ab_str: ab_strength_for_functors_and_pointed_functors
θ_Strength1_int θ_for_signature
 exact signature_from_ab_strength_law1.
    
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
ab_str: ab_strength_for_functors_and_pointed_functors
θ_Strength2_int θ_for_signature
 exact signature_from_ab_strength_law2.
  Defined.

End IndividualFunctorsWithABStrength.

Section IndividualStrongFunctors.

  Context (FF : actionbased_strong_functor Mon_endo' domain_action target_action).

  Definition signature_from_strong_functor : Signature C D D' :=
    signature_from_ab_strength FF (pr2 FF).

End IndividualStrongFunctors.

Section Morphisms.

  Context {FF GG : actionbased_strong_functor Mon_endo' domain_action target_action}.
  Context (sη : Strong_Functor_Category_Mor Mon_endo' domain_action target_action FF GG).

  
C, D, D': category
FF, GG: actionbased_strong_functor Mon_endo'
  domain_action target_action
sη: Strong_Functor_Category_Mor Mon_endo'
  domain_action target_action FF GG
X: [C, D']
Y: category_Ptd C
Signature_category_mor_diagram C D D'
  (signature_from_strong_functor FF)
  (signature_from_strong_functor GG) sη X Y

  
C, D, D': category
FF, GG: actionbased_strong_functor Mon_endo'
  domain_action target_action
sη: Strong_Functor_Category_Mor Mon_endo'
  domain_action target_action FF GG
X: [C, D']
Y: category_Ptd C
Signature_category_mor_diagram C D D'
  (signature_from_strong_functor FF)
  (signature_from_strong_functor GG) sη X Y

    
C, D, D': category
FF, GG: actionbased_strong_functor Mon_endo'
  domain_action target_action
sη: Strong_Functor_Category_Mor Mon_endo'
  domain_action target_action FF GG
X: [C, D']
Y: category_Ptd C
theta (signature_from_strong_functor FF) (X,, Y)
· sη (functor_ptd_forget C Y ∙ X) =
horcomp (id₁ (functor_ptd_forget C Y)) (sη X)
· theta (signature_from_strong_functor GG) (X,, Y)

    
C, D, D': category
FF, GG: actionbased_strong_functor Mon_endo'
  domain_action target_action
sη: Strong_Functor_Category_Mor Mon_endo'
  domain_action target_action FF GG
X: [C, D']
Y: category_Ptd C
nat_trans_comp
  (θ_for_signature_nat_trans_data FF (pr2 FF) (X,, Y))
  (sη (pr1 Y ∙ X)) =
nat_trans_comp
  (horcomp (nat_trans_id (pr11 Y)) (sη X))
  (θ_for_signature_nat_trans_data GG (pr2 GG) (X,, Y))

    
C, D, D': category
FF, GG: actionbased_strong_functor Mon_endo'
  domain_action target_action
sη: Strong_Functor_Category_Mor Mon_endo'
  domain_action target_action FF GG
X: [C, D']
Y: category_Ptd C
Hyp: Strong_Functor_Category_mor_diagram Mon_endo' domain_action target_action
(pr1 FF,, pr2 FF) (pr1 GG,, pr2 GG) (pr1 sη) X Y
nat_trans_comp
  (θ_for_signature_nat_trans_data FF (pr2 FF) (X,, Y))
  (sη (pr1 Y ∙ X)) =
nat_trans_comp
  (horcomp (nat_trans_id (pr11 Y)) (sη X))
  (θ_for_signature_nat_trans_data GG (pr2 GG) (X,, Y))

    
C, D, D': category
FF, GG: actionbased_strong_functor Mon_endo'
  domain_action target_action
sη: Strong_Functor_Category_Mor Mon_endo'
  domain_action target_action FF GG
X: [C, D']
Y: category_Ptd C
Hyp: ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory.ζ Mon_endo' domain_action target_action
(pr1 FF,, pr2 FF) (X, Y)
· pr1 sη
(ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory.odot Mon_endo' domain_action (X, Y)) =
# (ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory.odot' Mon_endo' target_action)
(pr1 sη X #, id₁ Y)
· ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory.ζ Mon_endo' domain_action target_action
(pr1 GG,, pr2 GG) (X, Y)
nat_trans_comp
  (θ_for_signature_nat_trans_data FF (pr2 FF) (X,, Y))
  (sη (pr1 Y ∙ X)) =
nat_trans_comp
  (horcomp (nat_trans_id (pr11 Y)) (sη X))
  (θ_for_signature_nat_trans_data GG (pr2 GG) (X,, Y))
 
C, D, D': category
FF, GG: actionbased_strong_functor Mon_endo'
  domain_action target_action
sη: Strong_Functor_Category_Mor Mon_endo'
  domain_action target_action FF GG
X: [C, D']
Y: category_Ptd C
Hyp: nat_trans_comp
(ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory.ζ Mon_endo' domain_action target_action
(pr1 FF,, pr2 FF) (X, Y)) (pr1 sη (pr1 Y ∙ X)) =
nat_trans_comp
(nat_trans_comp (post_whisker (nat_trans_id Y) (pr1 FF X))
(pre_whisker (pr1 Y) (pr1 sη X)))
(ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory.ζ Mon_endo' domain_action target_action
(pr1 GG,, pr2 GG) (X, Y))
nat_trans_comp
  (θ_for_signature_nat_trans_data FF (pr2 FF) (X,, Y))
  (sη (pr1 Y ∙ X)) =
nat_trans_comp
  (horcomp (nat_trans_id (pr11 Y)) (sη X))
  (θ_for_signature_nat_trans_data GG (pr2 GG) (X,, Y))

(pre_whisker (pr1 Y) (pr1 sη X)))
(ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory.ζ Mon_endo' domain_action target_action
(pr1 GG,, pr2 GG) (X, Y))
nat_trans_comp
  (θ_for_signature_nat_trans_data FF (pr2 FF) (X,, Y))
  (sη (pr1 Y ∙ X)) = ?b

(pre_whisker (pr1 Y) (pr1 sη X)))

(pr1 GG,, pr2 GG) (X, Y))
nat_trans_comp
  (θ_for_signature_nat_trans_data FF (pr2 FF) (X,, Y))
  (sη (pr1 Y ∙ X)) = ?b
 exact Hyp. 
C, D, D': category
FF, GG: actionbased_strong_functor Mon_endo'
  domain_action target_action
sη: Strong_Functor_Category_Mor Mon_endo'
  domain_action target_action FF GG
X: [C, D']
Y: category_Ptd C
Hyp: nat_trans_comp
(ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory.ζ Mon_endo' domain_action target_action
(pr1 FF,, pr2 FF) (X, Y)) (pr1 sη (pr1 Y ∙ X)) =
nat_trans_comp
(nat_trans_comp (post_whisker (nat_trans_id Y) (pr1 FF X))
(pre_whisker (pr1 Y) (pr1 sη X)))
(ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory.ζ Mon_endo' domain_action target_action
(pr1 GG,, pr2 GG) (X, Y))
nat_trans_comp
  (nat_trans_comp
     (post_whisker (nat_trans_id Y) (pr1 FF X))
     (pre_whisker (pr1 Y) (pr1 sη X)))
  (ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory.ζ Mon_endo'
     domain_action target_action (pr1 GG,, pr2 GG)
     (X, Y)) =
nat_trans_comp
  (horcomp (nat_trans_id (pr11 Y)) (sη X))
  (θ_for_signature_nat_trans_data GG (pr2 GG) (X,, Y))

    
C, D, D': category
FF, GG: actionbased_strong_functor Mon_endo'
  domain_action target_action

  domain_action target_action FF GG
X: [C, D']
Y: category_Ptd C
nat_trans_comp
  (nat_trans_comp
     (post_whisker (nat_trans_id Y) (pr1 FF X))
     (pre_whisker (pr1 Y) (pr1 sη X)))
  (ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory.ζ Mon_endo'
     domain_action target_action (pr1 GG,, pr2 GG)
     (X, Y)) =
nat_trans_comp
  (horcomp (nat_trans_id (pr11 Y)) (sη X))
  (θ_for_signature_nat_trans_data GG (pr2 GG) (X,, Y))

    
C, D, D': category
FF, GG: actionbased_strong_functor Mon_endo'
  domain_action target_action
sη: Strong_Functor_Category_Mor Mon_endo'
  domain_action target_action FF GG
X: [C, D']
Y: category_Ptd C
nat_trans_comp
  (post_whisker (nat_trans_id Y) (pr1 FF X))
  (pre_whisker (pr1 Y) (pr1 sη X)) =
horcomp (nat_trans_id (pr11 Y)) (sη X)

    
C, D, D': category
FF, GG: actionbased_strong_functor Mon_endo'
  domain_action target_action
sη: Strong_Functor_Category_Mor Mon_endo'
  domain_action target_action FF GG
X: [C, D']
Y: category_Ptd C
horcomp (nat_trans_id (pr11 Y)) (sη X) =
nat_trans_comp
  (post_whisker (nat_trans_id Y) (pr1 FF X))
  (pre_whisker (pr1 Y) (pr1 sη X))

    apply (horcomp_post_pre _ _ D).
  Qed.

  
C, D, D': category
FF, GG: actionbased_strong_functor Mon_endo'
  domain_action target_action
sη: Strong_Functor_Category_Mor Mon_endo'
  domain_action target_action FF GG
SignatureMor C D D' (signature_from_strong_functor FF)
  (signature_from_strong_functor GG)

  
C, D, D': category
FF, GG: actionbased_strong_functor Mon_endo'
  domain_action target_action
sη: Strong_Functor_Category_Mor Mon_endo'
  domain_action target_action FF GG
SignatureMor C D D' (signature_from_strong_functor FF)
  (signature_from_strong_functor GG)

    
C, D, D': category
FF, GG: actionbased_strong_functor Mon_endo'
  domain_action target_action
sη: Strong_Functor_Category_Mor Mon_endo'
  domain_action target_action FF GG
Core.mor_disp (pr2 (signature_from_strong_functor FF))
  (pr2 (signature_from_strong_functor GG)) (pr1 sη)

    exact signature_mor_from_ab_strength_mor_diagram.
  Defined.

End Morphisms.

C, D, D': category
FF, GG, HH: Strong_Functor_category Mon_endo' domain_action

H: [C, D']

     (sη · sη')) H c =
pr1
  (# ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategoryToSignatureCategory_data
     sη
   · # ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategoryToSignatureCategory_data
       sη') H c

    apply idpath.
Qed.

Definition ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategoryToSignatureCategory : functor
   (Strong_Functor_category Mon_endo' domain_action target_action)
   (Signature_category C D D')
  := (_,,ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategoryToSignatureCategory_is_functor).

End Signature_From_ActionBased_Strength.


Section ActionBased_Strength_From_Signature.

Section IndividualSignatures.

  Context (sig : Signature C D D').

  
C, D, D': category
sig: Signature C D D'
x: [C, D'] ⊠ Mon_endo'
hom C D
⟦ actionbased_strength_dom Mon_endo' target_action sig
    x,
actionbased_strength_codom Mon_endo' domain_action sig
  x ⟧ =
functor_composite_data (pr12 x) (pr1 (sig (pr1 x)))
⟹ pr1 (sig (pr12 x ∙ pr1 x))

  
C, D, D': category
sig: Signature C D D'
x: [C, D'] ⊠ Mon_endo'
hom C D
⟦ actionbased_strength_dom Mon_endo' target_action sig
    x,
actionbased_strength_codom Mon_endo' domain_action sig
  x ⟧ =
functor_composite_data (pr12 x) (pr1 (sig (pr1 x)))
⟹ pr1 (sig (pr12 x ∙ pr1 x))

    apply idpath.
  Defined.

C, D, D': category
sig: Signature C D D'
x, x': [C, D'] ⊠ Mon_endo'
f: [C, D'] ⊠ Mon_endo' ⟦ x, x' ⟧
c: C
Heq: # (θ_source sig) f · theta sig x' = theta sig x · # (θ_target sig) f
(# (actionbased_strength_dom Mon_endo' target_action
      sig) f · θ_for_ab_strength_data x') c =
(θ_for_ab_strength_data x
 · # (actionbased_strength_codom Mon_endo'
        domain_action sig) f) c

    
C, D, D': category
sig: Signature C D D'
x, x': [C, D'] ⊠ Mon_endo'
f: [C, D'] ⊠ Mon_endo' ⟦ x, x' ⟧
c: C
Heq: # (θ_source sig) f · theta sig x' = theta sig x · # (θ_target sig) f
Heqc: (# (θ_source sig) f · theta sig x') c =
(theta sig x · # (θ_target sig) f) c
(# (actionbased_strength_dom Mon_endo' target_action
      sig) f · θ_for_ab_strength_data x') c =
(θ_for_ab_strength_data x
 · # (actionbased_strength_codom Mon_endo'
        domain_action sig) f) c

    
C, D, D': category
sig: Signature C D D'
x, x': [C, D'] ⊠ Mon_endo'
f: [C, D'] ⊠ Mon_endo' ⟦ x, x' ⟧
c: C
Heqc: (# (θ_source sig) f · theta sig x') c =
(theta sig x · # (θ_target sig) f) c
(# (actionbased_strength_dom Mon_endo' target_action
      sig) f · θ_for_ab_strength_data x') c =
(θ_for_ab_strength_data x
 · # (actionbased_strength_codom Mon_endo'
        domain_action sig) f) c

    
C, D, D': category
sig: Signature C D D'
x, x': [C, D'] ⊠ Mon_endo'
f: [C, D'] ⊠ Mon_endo' ⟦ x, x' ⟧
c: C
Heqc: # (pr1 (sig (pr1 x))) ((pr112 f) c)
· pr1 (# sig (pr1 f)) (pr1 (pr12 x') c)
· pr2 sig x' c =
pr2 sig x c
· # sig
    (post_whisker_in_funcat C C D' 
       (pr12 f) (pr1 x)
     · pre_whisker_in_funcat C C D' 
         (pr12 x') (pr1 f)) c
(# (actionbased_strength_dom Mon_endo' target_action
      sig) f · θ_for_ab_strength_data x') c =
(θ_for_ab_strength_data x
 · # (actionbased_strength_codom Mon_endo'
        domain_action sig) f) c

    
C, D, D': category
sig: Signature C D D'
x, x': [C, D'] ⊠ Mon_endo'
f: [C, D'] ⊠ Mon_endo' ⟦ x, x' ⟧
c: C
Heqc: # (pr1 (sig (pr1 x))) ((pr112 f) c)
· pr1 (# sig (pr1 f)) (pr1 (pr12 x') c)
· pr2 sig x' c =
pr2 sig x c
· # sig
    (post_whisker_in_funcat C C D' 
       (pr12 f) (pr1 x)
     · pre_whisker_in_funcat C C D' 
         (pr12 x') (pr1 f)) c
# (pr1 (sig (pr1 x))) ((pr112 f) c)
· pr1 (# sig (pr1 f)) (pr1 (pr12 x') c)
· θ_for_ab_strength_data x' c =
θ_for_ab_strength_data x c · # sig (pr1 f ⋆⋆ pr12 f) c

    
C, D, D': category
sig: Signature C D D'
x, x': [C, D'] ⊠ Mon_endo'
f: [C, D'] ⊠ Mon_endo' ⟦ x, x' ⟧
c: C
Heqc: # (pr1 (sig (pr1 x))) ((pr112 f) c)
· pr1 (# sig (pr1 f)) (pr1 (pr12 x') c)
· pr2 sig x' c =
pr2 sig x c
· # sig
    (post_whisker_in_funcat C C D' 
       (pr12 f) (pr1 x)
     · pre_whisker_in_funcat C C D' 
         (pr12 x') (pr1 f)) c
# (pr1 (sig (pr1 x))) ((pr112 f) c)
· pr1 (# sig (pr1 f)) (pr1 (pr12 x') c)
· θ_for_ab_strength_data x' c = ?b
C, D, D': category
sig: Signature C D D'
x, x': [C, D'] ⊠ Mon_endo'
f: [C, D'] ⊠ Mon_endo' ⟦ x, x' ⟧
c: C
Heqc: # (pr1 (sig (pr1 x))) ((pr112 f) c)
· pr1 (# sig (pr1 f)) (pr1 (pr12 x') c)
· pr2 sig x' c =
pr2 sig x c
· # sig
    (post_whisker_in_funcat C C D' 
       (pr12 f) (pr1 x)
     · pre_whisker_in_funcat C C D' 
         (pr12 x') (pr1 f)) c
?b =
θ_for_ab_strength_data x c · # sig (pr1 f ⋆⋆ pr12 f) c

    
C, D, D': category
sig: Signature C D D'
x, x': [C, D'] ⊠ Mon_endo'
f: [C, D'] ⊠ Mon_endo' ⟦ x, x' ⟧
c: C
Heqc: # (pr1 (sig (pr1 x))) ((pr112 f) c)
· pr1 (# sig (pr1 f)) (pr1 (pr12 x') c)
· pr2 sig x' c =
pr2 sig x c
· # sig
    (post_whisker_in_funcat C C D' 
       (pr12 f) (pr1 x)
     · pre_whisker_in_funcat C C D' 
         (pr12 x') (pr1 f)) c
# (pr1 (sig (pr1 x))) ((pr112 f) c)
· pr1 (# sig (pr1 f)) (pr1 (pr12 x') c)
· θ_for_ab_strength_data x' c = ?b
 exact Heqc. 
C, D, D': category
sig: Signature C D D'
x, x': [C, D'] ⊠ Mon_endo'
f: [C, D'] ⊠ Mon_endo' ⟦ x, x' ⟧
c: C
Heqc: # (pr1 (sig (pr1 x))) ((pr112 f) c)
· pr1 (# sig (pr1 f)) (pr1 (pr12 x') c)
· pr2 sig x' c =
pr2 sig x c
· # sig
    (post_whisker_in_funcat C C D' 
       (pr12 f) (pr1 x)
     · pre_whisker_in_funcat C C D' 
         (pr12 x') (pr1 f)) c
pr2 sig x c
· # sig
    (post_whisker_in_funcat C C D' (pr12 f) (pr1 x)
     · pre_whisker_in_funcat C C D' (pr12 x') (pr1 f))
    c =
θ_for_ab_strength_data x c · # sig (pr1 f ⋆⋆ pr12 f) c

    
C, D, D': category
sig: Signature C D D'
x, x': [C, D'] ⊠ Mon_endo'
f: [C, D'] ⊠ Mon_endo' ⟦ x, x' ⟧
c: C
pr2 sig x c
· # sig
    (post_whisker_in_funcat C C D' (pr12 f) (pr1 x)
     · pre_whisker_in_funcat C C D' (pr12 x') (pr1 f))
    c =
θ_for_ab_strength_data x c · # sig (pr1 f ⋆⋆ pr12 f) c

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

C, D, D': category
sig: Signature C D D'
∏ a : hom C D',
θ_for_ab_strength (a, ActionBasedStrength.I Mon_endo')
· # sig
    (ActionBasedStrength.ϱ Mon_endo' domain_action a) =
ActionBasedStrength.ϱ' Mon_endo' target_action (sig a)
 
C, D, D': category
sig: Signature C D D'
X: hom C D'
θ_for_ab_strength (X, ActionBasedStrength.I Mon_endo')
· # sig
    (ActionBasedStrength.ϱ Mon_endo' domain_action X) =
ActionBasedStrength.ϱ' Mon_endo' target_action (sig X)

    
C, D, D': category
sig: Signature C D D'
X: hom C D'
HypX: (pr12 sig) (X, id_Ptd C)
· # (pr1 sig)
    (BicatOfCatsElementary.lunitor_CAT
       (pr2
          (binswap_pair_functor
             (pair_functor
                (functor_identity [C, D'])
                (functor_ptd_forget C)
                (X, id_Ptd C))))) =
BicatOfCatsElementary.lunitor_CAT
  (pr2
     (binswap_pair_functor
        (pair_functor (pr1 sig)
           (functor_ptd_forget C) 
           (X, id_Ptd C))))
θ_for_ab_strength (X, ActionBasedStrength.I Mon_endo')
· # sig
    (ActionBasedStrength.ϱ Mon_endo' domain_action X) =
ActionBasedStrength.ϱ' Mon_endo' target_action (sig X)

    
C, D, D': category
sig: Signature C D D'
X: hom C D'
HypX: (pr12 sig) (X, id_Ptd C)
· # (pr1 sig)
    (BicatOfCatsElementary.lunitor_CAT
       (pr2
          (binswap_pair_functor
             (pair_functor
                (functor_identity [C, D'])
                (functor_ptd_forget C)
                (X, id_Ptd C))))) =
BicatOfCatsElementary.lunitor_CAT
  (pr2
     (binswap_pair_functor
        (pair_functor (pr1 sig)
           (functor_ptd_forget C) 
           (X, id_Ptd C))))
∏ x : C,
(θ_for_ab_strength
   (X, ActionBasedStrength.I Mon_endo')
 · # sig

  Defined.

  Definition ab_strong_functor_from_signature :
    actionbased_strong_functor Mon_endo' domain_action target_action
    := (pr1 sig,,ab_strength_from_signature).

End IndividualSignatures.

Section Morphisms.

  Context {sig1 sig2 : Signature C D D'}.
  Context (f : SignatureMor C D D' sig1 sig2).

  
C, D, D': category
sig1, sig2: Signature C D D'
f: SignatureMor C D D' sig1 sig2
is_nat_trans (pr1 sig1) (pr1 sig2) (pr11 f)

  
C, D, D': category
sig1, sig2: Signature C D D'
f: SignatureMor C D D' sig1 sig2
is_nat_trans (pr1 sig1) (pr1 sig2) (pr11 f)

    
C, D, D': category
sig1, sig2: Signature C D D'
f: SignatureMor C D D' sig1 sig2
∏ (x x' : [C, D']) (f0 : [C, D'] ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (pr1 sig1) f0 · (pr11 f) x' =
(pr11 f) x · # (pr1 sig2) f0

    
C, D, D': category
sig1, sig2: Signature C D D'
f: SignatureMor C D D' sig1 sig2
F, F': [C, D']
g: [C, D'] ⟦ F, F' ⟧
# (pr1 sig1) g · (pr11 f) F' =
(pr11 f) F · # (pr1 sig2) g

    
C, D, D': category
sig1, sig2: Signature C D D'
f: SignatureMor C D D' sig1 sig2
F, F': [C, D']
g: [C, D'] ⟦ F, F' ⟧
nat_trans_comp (# (pr1 sig1) g) ((pr11 f) F') =
nat_trans_comp ((pr11 f) F) (# (pr1 sig2) g)

    
C, D, D': category
sig1, sig2: Signature C D D'
f: SignatureMor C D D' sig1 sig2
F, F': [C, D']
g: [C, D'] ⟦ F, F' ⟧
Hyp: # (pr1 sig1) g · (pr11 f) F' =
(pr11 f) F · # (pr1 sig2) g
nat_trans_comp (# (pr1 sig1) g) ((pr11 f) F') =
nat_trans_comp ((pr11 f) F) (# (pr1 sig2) g)

    exact Hyp.
  Qed.

sig1, sig2: Signature C D D'
f: SignatureMor C D D' sig1 sig2
ab_strong_functor_from_signature sig1
⟹ ab_strong_functor_from_signature sig2

sig1, sig2: Signature C D D'
f: SignatureMor C D D' sig1 sig2
ab_strong_functor_from_signature sig1
⟹ ab_strong_functor_from_signature sig2

sig1, sig2: Signature C D D'
f: SignatureMor C D D' sig1 sig2
is_nat_trans (ab_strong_functor_from_signature sig1)
  (ab_strong_functor_from_signature sig2) (pr11 f)

    exact ab_strength_mor_from_signature_mor_is_nat_trans.
  Defined.

  
C, D, D': category
sig1, sig2: Signature C D D'
f: SignatureMor C D D' sig1 sig2
a: hom C D'
v: Mon_endo'
Strong_Functor_Category_mor_diagram Mon_endo'
  domain_action target_action
  (ab_strong_functor_from_signature sig1)
  (ab_strong_functor_from_signature sig2)
  ab_strength_mor_from_signature_mor_nat_trans a v

sig1, sig2: Signature C D D'
f: SignatureMor C D D' sig1 sig2
a: hom C D'
v: Mon_endo'
Strong_Functor_Category_mor_diagram Mon_endo'
  domain_action target_action

C, D, D': category
sig1, sig2: Signature C D D'
f: SignatureMor C D D' sig1 sig2
a: hom C D'
v: Mon_endo'
ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory.ζ Mon_endo'
  domain_action target_action
  (ab_strong_functor_from_signature sig1) (a, v)
· ab_strength_mor_from_signature_mor_nat_trans
    (ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory.odot Mon_endo'
       domain_action (a, v)) =
# (ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory.odot' Mon_endo'
     target_action)
  (ab_strength_mor_from_signature_mor_nat_trans a
  #, id₁ v)
· ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory.ζ Mon_endo'
    domain_action target_action
    (ab_strong_functor_from_signature sig2) (a, v)

    
C, D, D': category
sig1, sig2: Signature C D D'
f: SignatureMor C D D' sig1 sig2
a: hom C D'
v: Mon_endo'
nat_trans_comp (pr2 sig1 (a, v))
  ((pr11 f) (pr1 v ∙ a)) =
nat_trans_comp
  (nat_trans_comp
     (post_whisker (nat_trans_id v) (pr1 sig1 a))
     (pre_whisker (pr1 v) ((pr11 f) a)))
  (pr2 sig2 (a, v))

    
C, D, D': category
sig1, sig2: Signature C D D'
f: SignatureMor C D D' sig1 sig2
a: hom C D'
v: Mon_endo'
Hyp: Signature_category_mor_diagram C D D'
  (pr1 sig1,, pr2 sig1) (pr1 sig2,, pr2 sig2)
  (pr1 f) a v
nat_trans_comp (pr2 sig1 (a, v))
  ((pr11 f) (pr1 v ∙ a)) =
nat_trans_comp
  (nat_trans_comp
     (post_whisker (nat_trans_id v) (pr1 sig1 a))
     (pre_whisker (pr1 v) ((pr11 f) a)))
  (pr2 sig2 (a, v))

    
C, D, D': category
sig1, sig2: Signature C D D'
f: SignatureMor C D D' sig1 sig2
a: hom C D'
v: Mon_endo'
Hyp: theta (pr1 sig1,, pr2 sig1) (a,, v)
· pr1 f (functor_ptd_forget C v ∙ a) =
horcomp (id₁ (functor_ptd_forget C v)) (pr1 f a)
· theta (pr1 sig2,, pr2 sig2) (a,, v)
nat_trans_comp (pr2 sig1 (a, v))
  ((pr11 f) (pr1 v ∙ a)) =
nat_trans_comp
  (nat_trans_comp
     (post_whisker (nat_trans_id v) (pr1 sig1 a))
     (pre_whisker (pr1 v) ((pr11 f) a)))
  (pr2 sig2 (a, v))
 
C, D, D': category
sig1, sig2: Signature C D D'
f: SignatureMor C D D' sig1 sig2
a: hom C D'
v: Mon_endo'
Hyp: nat_trans_comp (pr2 sig1 (a,, v))
  (pr1 f (pr1 v ∙ a)) =
nat_trans_comp
  (horcomp (nat_trans_id (pr11 v)) (pr1 f a))
  (pr2 sig2 (a,, v))
nat_trans_comp (pr2 sig1 (a, v))
  ((pr11 f) (pr1 v ∙ a)) =
nat_trans_comp
  (nat_trans_comp
     (post_whisker (nat_trans_id v) (pr1 sig1 a))
     (pre_whisker (pr1 v) ((pr11 f) a)))
  (pr2 sig2 (a, v))

    
C, D, D': category
sig1, sig2: Signature C D D'
f: SignatureMor C D D' sig1 sig2
a: hom C D'
v: Mon_endo'
Hyp: nat_trans_comp (pr2 sig1 (a,, v))
  (pr1 f (pr1 v ∙ a)) =
nat_trans_comp
  (horcomp (nat_trans_id (pr11 v)) (pr1 f a))
  (pr2 sig2 (a,, v))
nat_trans_comp (pr2 sig1 (a, v))
  ((pr11 f) (pr1 v ∙ a)) = ?b
C, D, D': category
sig1, sig2: Signature C D D'
f: SignatureMor C D D' sig1 sig2
a: hom C D'
v: Mon_endo'
Hyp: nat_trans_comp (pr2 sig1 (a,, v))
  (pr1 f (pr1 v ∙ a)) =
nat_trans_comp
  (horcomp (nat_trans_id (pr11 v)) (pr1 f a))
  (pr2 sig2 (a,, v))
?b =
nat_trans_comp
  (nat_trans_comp
     (post_whisker (nat_trans_id v) (pr1 sig1 a))
     (pre_whisker (pr1 v) ((pr11 f) a)))
  (pr2 sig2 (a, v))

    
C, D, D': category
sig1, sig2: Signature C D D'
f: SignatureMor C D D' sig1 sig2
a: hom C D'
v: Mon_endo'
Hyp: nat_trans_comp (pr2 sig1 (a,, v))
  (pr1 f (pr1 v ∙ a)) =
nat_trans_comp
  (horcomp (nat_trans_id (pr11 v)) (pr1 f a))
  (pr2 sig2 (a,, v))
nat_trans_comp (pr2 sig1 (a, v))
  ((pr11 f) (pr1 v ∙ a)) = ?b
 exact Hyp. 
C, D, D': category
sig1, sig2: Signature C D D'
f: SignatureMor C D D' sig1 sig2
a: hom C D'
v: Mon_endo'
Hyp: nat_trans_comp (pr2 sig1 (a,, v))
  (pr1 f (pr1 v ∙ a)) =
nat_trans_comp
  (horcomp (nat_trans_id (pr11 v)) (pr1 f a))
  (pr2 sig2 (a,, v))
nat_trans_comp
  (horcomp (nat_trans_id (pr11 v)) (pr1 f a))
  (pr2 sig2 (a,, v)) =
nat_trans_comp
  (nat_trans_comp
     (post_whisker (nat_trans_id v) (pr1 sig1 a))
     (pre_whisker (pr1 v) ((pr11 f) a)))
  (pr2 sig2 (a, v))

    
C, D, D': category
sig1, sig2: Signature C D D'
f: SignatureMor C D D' sig1 sig2
a: hom C D'
v: Mon_endo'
nat_trans_comp
  (horcomp (nat_trans_id (pr11 v)) (pr1 f a))
  (pr2 sig2 (a,, v)) =
nat_trans_comp
  (nat_trans_comp
     (post_whisker (nat_trans_id v) (pr1 sig1 a))
     (pre_whisker (pr1 v) ((pr11 f) a)))
  (pr2 sig2 (a, v))

    
C, D, D': category
sig1, sig2: Signature C D D'
f: SignatureMor C D D' sig1 sig2
a: hom C D'
v: Mon_endo'
horcomp (nat_trans_id (pr11 v)) (pr1 f a) =
nat_trans_comp
  (post_whisker (nat_trans_id v) (pr1 sig1 a))
  (pre_whisker (pr1 v) ((pr11 f) a))

    apply (horcomp_post_pre _ _ D).
  Qed.

Core.mor_disp
  (pr2 (ab_strong_functor_from_signature sig1))

End Morphisms.

Strong_Functor_category Mon_endo' domain_action

 exact (ab_strong_functor_from_signature sig).

Signature_category C D D' ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ Strong_Functor_category Mon_endo' domain_action
    target_action
  ⟦ (λ sig : Signature_category C D D',
     ab_strong_functor_from_signature sig) a,
  (λ sig : Signature_category C D D',
   ab_strong_functor_from_signature sig) b ⟧
 
C, D, D': category
sig1, sig2: Signature_category C D D'
f: Signature_category C D D' ⟦ sig1, sig2 ⟧
Strong_Functor_category Mon_endo' domain_action
  target_action
⟦ (λ sig : Signature_category C D D',
   ab_strong_functor_from_signature sig) sig1,
(λ sig : Signature_category C D D',
 ab_strong_functor_from_signature sig) sig2 ⟧
 exact (ab_strength_mor_from_signature_mor f).
Defined.

functor_compax

F, G, H: Signature_category C D D'
f: Signature_category C D D' ⟦ F, G ⟧
g: Signature_category C D D' ⟦ G, H ⟧

  f
· # SignatureCategoryToActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory_data
    g

pr1

     (f · g)) =

       g)

f: Signature_category C D D' ⟦ F, G ⟧
g: Signature_category C D D' ⟦ G, H ⟧

       g) x

    
C, D, D': category
F, G, H: Signature_category C D D'
f: Signature_category C D D' ⟦ F, G ⟧
g: Signature_category C D D' ⟦ G, H ⟧
X: hom C D'
pr1
  (# SignatureCategoryToActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory_data

C, D, D': category
F, G, H: Signature_category C D D'
f: Signature_category C D D' ⟦ F, G ⟧
g: Signature_category C D D' ⟦ G, H ⟧
X: hom C D'
∏ x : C,
pr1
  (# SignatureCategoryToActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory_data
     (f · g)) X x =
pr1
  (# SignatureCategoryToActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory_data
     f
   · # SignatureCategoryToActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory_data
       g) X x

    
C, D, D': category
F, G, H: Signature_category C D D'
f: Signature_category C D D' ⟦ F, G ⟧
g: Signature_category C D D' ⟦ G, H ⟧
X: hom C D'
c: C
pr1
  (# SignatureCategoryToActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory_data
     (f · g)) X c =
pr1
  (# SignatureCategoryToActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory_data
     f
   · # SignatureCategoryToActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory_data
       g) X c

    apply idpath.
Qed.

Definition SignatureCategoryToActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory : functor
  (Signature_category C D D')
  (Strong_Functor_category Mon_endo' domain_action target_action)
  := (_,,SignatureCategoryToActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory_is_functor).


End ActionBased_Strength_From_Signature.

(* the following lemma cannot be used in the construction of the equivalence of categories *)

C, D, D': category
sig: Signature C D D'
signature_from_strong_functor
  (ab_strong_functor_from_signature sig) = sig


C, D, D': category
sig: Signature C D D'
signature_from_strong_functor
  (ab_strong_functor_from_signature sig) = sig

  
C, D, D': category
sig: Signature C D D'
pr1
  (signature_from_strong_functor
     (ab_strong_functor_from_signature sig)) = pr1 sig
C, D, D': category
sig: Signature C D D'
transportf StrengthForSignature ?p
  (pr2
     (signature_from_strong_functor
        (ab_strong_functor_from_signature sig))) =
pr2 sig

  
C, D, D': category
sig: Signature C D D'
pr1
  (signature_from_strong_functor
     (ab_strong_functor_from_signature sig)) = pr1 sig
 apply idpath.
  
C, D, D': category
sig: Signature C D D'
transportf StrengthForSignature (idpath (pr1 sig))
  (pr2
     (signature_from_strong_functor
        (ab_strong_functor_from_signature sig))) =
pr2 sig
 
C, D, D': category
sig: Signature C D D'
θ_for_signature (pr1 sig)
  (ab_strength_from_signature sig),,
signature_from_ab_strength_law1 (pr1 sig)
  (ab_strength_from_signature sig),,
signature_from_ab_strength_law2 (pr1 sig)
  (ab_strength_from_signature sig) = pr2 sig

    
C, D, D': category
sig: Signature C D D'
pr1
  (θ_for_signature (pr1 sig)
     (ab_strength_from_signature sig),,
   signature_from_ab_strength_law1 (pr1 sig)
     (ab_strength_from_signature sig),,
   signature_from_ab_strength_law2 (pr1 sig)
     (ab_strength_from_signature sig)) = pr12 sig
C, D, D': category
sig: Signature C D D'
transportf
  (λ x : PrestrengthForSignature (pr1 sig),
   θ_Strength1_int x × θ_Strength2_int x) ?p
  (pr2
     (θ_for_signature (pr1 sig)
        (ab_strength_from_signature sig),,
      signature_from_ab_strength_law1 (pr1 sig)
        (ab_strength_from_signature sig),,
      signature_from_ab_strength_law2 (pr1 sig)
        (ab_strength_from_signature sig))) = pr22 sig

    
C, D, D': category
sig: Signature C D D'
pr1
  (θ_for_signature (pr1 sig)
     (ab_strength_from_signature sig),,
   signature_from_ab_strength_law1 (pr1 sig)
     (ab_strength_from_signature sig),,
   signature_from_ab_strength_law2 (pr1 sig)
     (ab_strength_from_signature sig)) = pr12 sig
 
C, D, D': category
sig: Signature C D D'
∏ x : [C, D'] ⊠ category_Ptd C,
pr1
  (θ_for_signature (pr1 sig)
     (ab_strength_from_signature sig),,
   signature_from_ab_strength_law1 (pr1 sig)
     (ab_strength_from_signature sig),,
   signature_from_ab_strength_law2 (pr1 sig)
     (ab_strength_from_signature sig)) x =
(pr12 sig) x

      intro x; apply idpath.
    
C, D, D': category
sig: Signature C D D'
transportf
  (λ x : PrestrengthForSignature (pr1 sig),
   θ_Strength1_int x × θ_Strength2_int x)
  (nat_trans_eq_alt (θ_source (pr1 sig))
     (θ_target (pr1 sig))
     (pr1
        (θ_for_signature (pr1 sig)
           (ab_strength_from_signature sig),,
         signature_from_ab_strength_law1 (pr1 sig)
           (ab_strength_from_signature sig),,
         signature_from_ab_strength_law2 (pr1 sig)
           (ab_strength_from_signature sig)))
     (pr12 sig)
     (λ x : [C, D'] ⊠ category_Ptd C,
      idpath ((pr12 sig) x)))
  (pr2
     (θ_for_signature (pr1 sig)
        (ab_strength_from_signature sig),,
      signature_from_ab_strength_law1 (pr1 sig)
        (ab_strength_from_signature sig),,
      signature_from_ab_strength_law2 (pr1 sig)
        (ab_strength_from_signature sig))) = pr22 sig
 
C, D, D': category
sig: Signature C D D'
pr1
  (transportf
     (λ x : PrestrengthForSignature (pr1 sig),
      θ_Strength1_int x × θ_Strength2_int x)
     (nat_trans_eq_alt (θ_source (pr1 sig))
        (θ_target (pr1 sig))
        (pr1
           (θ_for_signature (pr1 sig)
              (ab_strength_from_signature sig),,
            signature_from_ab_strength_law1 (pr1 sig)
              (ab_strength_from_signature sig),,
            signature_from_ab_strength_law2 (pr1 sig)
              (ab_strength_from_signature sig)))
        (pr12 sig)
        (λ x : [C, D'] ⊠ category_Ptd C,
         idpath ((pr12 sig) x)))
     (pr2
        (θ_for_signature (pr1 sig)
           (ab_strength_from_signature sig),,
         signature_from_ab_strength_law1 (pr1 sig)
           (ab_strength_from_signature sig),,
         signature_from_ab_strength_law2 (pr1 sig)
           (ab_strength_from_signature sig)))) =
pr122 sig
C, D, D': category
sig: Signature C D D'
pr2
  (transportf
     (λ x : PrestrengthForSignature (pr1 sig),
      θ_Strength1_int x × θ_Strength2_int x)
     (nat_trans_eq_alt (θ_source (pr1 sig))
        (θ_target (pr1 sig))
        (pr1
           (θ_for_signature (pr1 sig)
              (ab_strength_from_signature sig),,
            signature_from_ab_strength_law1 (pr1 sig)
              (ab_strength_from_signature sig),,
            signature_from_ab_strength_law2 (pr1 sig)
              (ab_strength_from_signature sig)))
        (pr12 sig)
        (λ x : [C, D'] ⊠ category_Ptd C,
         idpath ((pr12 sig) x)))
     (pr2
        (θ_for_signature (pr1 sig)
           (ab_strength_from_signature sig),,
         signature_from_ab_strength_law1 (pr1 sig)
           (ab_strength_from_signature sig),,
         signature_from_ab_strength_law2 (pr1 sig)
           (ab_strength_from_signature sig)))) =
pr222 sig

      
C, D, D': category
sig: Signature C D D'
pr1
  (transportf
     (λ x : PrestrengthForSignature (pr1 sig),
      θ_Strength1_int x × θ_Strength2_int x)
     (nat_trans_eq_alt (θ_source (pr1 sig))
        (θ_target (pr1 sig))
        (pr1
           (θ_for_signature (pr1 sig)
              (ab_strength_from_signature sig),,
            signature_from_ab_strength_law1 (pr1 sig)
              (ab_strength_from_signature sig),,
            signature_from_ab_strength_law2 (pr1 sig)
              (ab_strength_from_signature sig)))
        (pr12 sig)
        (λ x : [C, D'] ⊠ category_Ptd C,
         idpath ((pr12 sig) x)))
     (pr2
        (θ_for_signature (pr1 sig)
           (ab_strength_from_signature sig),,
         signature_from_ab_strength_law1 (pr1 sig)
           (ab_strength_from_signature sig),,
         signature_from_ab_strength_law2 (pr1 sig)
           (ab_strength_from_signature sig)))) =
pr122 sig
 apply isaprop_θ_Strength1_int.
      
C, D, D': category
sig: Signature C D D'
pr2
  (transportf
     (λ x : PrestrengthForSignature (pr1 sig),
      θ_Strength1_int x × θ_Strength2_int x)
     (nat_trans_eq_alt (θ_source (pr1 sig))
        (θ_target (pr1 sig))
        (pr1
           (θ_for_signature (pr1 sig)
              (ab_strength_from_signature sig),,
            signature_from_ab_strength_law1 (pr1 sig)
              (ab_strength_from_signature sig),,
            signature_from_ab_strength_law2 (pr1 sig)
              (ab_strength_from_signature sig)))
        (pr12 sig)
        (λ x : [C, D'] ⊠ category_Ptd C,
         idpath ((pr12 sig) x)))
     (pr2
        (θ_for_signature (pr1 sig)
           (ab_strength_from_signature sig),,
         signature_from_ab_strength_law1 (pr1 sig)
           (ab_strength_from_signature sig),,
         signature_from_ab_strength_law2 (pr1 sig)
           (ab_strength_from_signature sig)))) =
pr222 sig
 apply isaprop_θ_Strength2_int.
Defined.

C, D, D': category
sig: Signature_category C D D'
(λ f : pr1 sig ⟹ pr1 sig,
 quantified_signature_category_mor_diagram C D D'
   (pr1 sig,, pr2 sig)
   (pr1 sig,,
    θ_for_signature (pr1 sig)
      (ab_strength_from_signature sig),,
    signature_from_ab_strength_law1 (pr1 sig)
      (ab_strength_from_signature sig),,
    signature_from_ab_strength_law2 (pr1 sig)
      (ab_strength_from_signature sig)) f)
  (make_nat_trans (pr1 sig) (pr1 sig)
     ((λ X : functor_precategory_data C D',
       id₁ ((pr11 sig) X))
      :
      nat_trans_data (pr1 sig) (pr1 sig))
     ((λ (X1 X2 : functor_precategory_data C D')
       (f : functor_precategory_data C D' ⟦ X1, X2 ⟧),
       id_right (# (pr11 sig) f) @
       idpath (# (pr11 sig) f) @
       ! id_left (# (pr11 sig) f))
      :
      is_nat_trans (pr1 sig) (pr1 sig)
        ((λ X : functor_precategory_data C D',
          id₁ ((pr11 sig) X))
         :
         nat_trans_data (pr1 sig) (pr1 sig))))
 
C, D, D': category
sig: Signature_category C D D'
X: [C, D']
Y: category_Ptd C
Signature_category_mor_diagram C D D'
  (pr1 sig,, pr2 sig)
  (pr1 sig,,
   θ_for_signature (pr1 sig)
     (ab_strength_from_signature sig),,
   signature_from_ab_strength_law1 (pr1 sig)
     (ab_strength_from_signature sig),,
   signature_from_ab_strength_law2 (pr1 sig)
     (ab_strength_from_signature sig))
  (make_nat_trans (pr1 sig) (pr1 sig)
     (λ X : functor_precategory_data C D',
      id₁ ((pr11 sig) X))
     (λ (X1 X2 : functor_precategory_data C D')
      (f : functor_precategory_data C D' ⟦ X1, X2 ⟧),
      id_right (# (pr11 sig) f) @
      idpath (# (pr11 sig) f) @
      ! id_left (# (pr11 sig) f))) X Y
 
C, D, D': category
sig: Signature_category C D D'
X: [C, D']
Y: category_Ptd C
theta (pr1 sig,, pr2 sig) (X,, Y)
· make_nat_trans (pr1 sig) (pr1 sig)
    (λ X : functor_precategory_data C D',
     id₁ ((pr11 sig) X))
    (λ (X1 X2 : functor_precategory_data C D')
     (f : functor_precategory_data C D' ⟦ X1, X2 ⟧),
     id_right (# (pr11 sig) f) @
     idpath (# (pr11 sig) f) @
     ! id_left (# (pr11 sig) f))
    (functor_ptd_forget C Y ∙ X) =
horcomp (id₁ (functor_ptd_forget C Y))
  (make_nat_trans (pr1 sig) (pr1 sig)
     (λ X : functor_precategory_data C D',
      id₁ ((pr11 sig) X))
     (λ (X1 X2 : functor_precategory_data C D')
      (f : functor_precategory_data C D' ⟦ X1, X2 ⟧),
      id_right (# (pr11 sig) f) @
      idpath (# (pr11 sig) f) @
      ! id_left (# (pr11 sig) f)) X)
· theta
    (pr1 sig,,
     θ_for_signature (pr1 sig)
       (ab_strength_from_signature sig),,
     signature_from_ab_strength_law1 (pr1 sig)
       (ab_strength_from_signature sig),,
     signature_from_ab_strength_law2 (pr1 sig)
       (ab_strength_from_signature sig)) (X,, Y)

    
C, D, D': category
sig: Signature_category C D D'
X: [C, D']
Y: category_Ptd C
∏ x : C,
(theta (pr1 sig,, pr2 sig) (X,, Y)
 · make_nat_trans (pr1 sig) (pr1 sig)
     (λ X : functor_precategory_data C D',
      id₁ ((pr11 sig) X))
     (λ (X1 X2 : functor_precategory_data C D')
      (f : functor_precategory_data C D' ⟦ X1, X2 ⟧),
      id_right (# (pr11 sig) f) @
      idpath (# (pr11 sig) f) @
      ! id_left (# (pr11 sig) f))
     (functor_ptd_forget C Y ∙ X)) x =
(horcomp (id₁ (functor_ptd_forget C Y))
   (make_nat_trans (pr1 sig) (pr1 sig)
      (λ X : functor_precategory_data C D',
       id₁ ((pr11 sig) X))
      (λ (X1 X2 : functor_precategory_data C D')
       (f : functor_precategory_data C D' ⟦ X1, X2 ⟧),
       id_right (# (pr11 sig) f) @
       idpath (# (pr11 sig) f) @
       ! id_left (# (pr11 sig) f)) X)
 · theta
     (pr1 sig,,
      θ_for_signature (pr1 sig)
        (ab_strength_from_signature sig),,
      signature_from_ab_strength_law1 (pr1 sig)
        (ab_strength_from_signature sig),,
      signature_from_ab_strength_law2 (pr1 sig)
        (ab_strength_from_signature sig)) (X,, Y)) x

      ! id_left (# (pr11 sig) f))
     (functor_ptd_forget C Y ∙ X)) c =

Defined.

C, D, D': category
sig: Signature_category C D D'
(λ f : [[C, D'], [C, D]]

f: Signature_category C D D' ⟦ sig1, sig2 ⟧
∏ x : [C, D'],
pr1
  (# (functor_identity (Signature_category C D D')) f
   · roundtrip1_ob_nat_trans_data sig2) x =
pr1
  (roundtrip1_ob_nat_trans_data sig1
   · # (SignatureCategoryToActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory
        ∙ ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategoryToSignatureCategory)
       f) x

  
C, D, D': category
sig1, sig2: Signature_category C D D'
f: Signature_category C D D' ⟦ sig1, sig2 ⟧
X: [C, D']
pr1
  (# (functor_identity (Signature_category C D D')) f
   · roundtrip1_ob_nat_trans_data sig2) X =
pr1
  (roundtrip1_ob_nat_trans_data sig1
   · # (SignatureCategoryToActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory
        ∙ ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategoryToSignatureCategory)
       f) X

  
C, D, D': category
sig1, sig2: Signature_category C D D'
f: Signature_category C D D' ⟦ sig1, sig2 ⟧
X: [C, D']
pr1
  (# (functor_identity (Signature_category C D D')) f
   · roundtrip1_ob_nat_trans_data sig2) X = ?b
C, D, D': category
sig1, sig2: Signature_category C D D'
f: Signature_category C D D' ⟦ sig1, sig2 ⟧
X: [C, D']
?b =
pr1
  (roundtrip1_ob_nat_trans_data sig1
   · # (SignatureCategoryToActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory
        ∙ ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategoryToSignatureCategory)
       f) X

  
C, D, D': category
sig1, sig2: Signature_category C D D'
f: Signature_category C D D' ⟦ sig1, sig2 ⟧
X: [C, D']
pr1
  (# (functor_identity (Signature_category C D D')) f
   · roundtrip1_ob_nat_trans_data sig2) X = ?b
 
C, D, D': category
sig1, sig2: Signature_category C D D'
f: Signature_category C D D' ⟦ sig1, sig2 ⟧
X: [C, D']
nat_trans_comp (pr1 f X)
  (nat_trans_id (pr1 ((pr11 sig2) X))) = ?b
 apply (id_right(C:=[C, D])). 
C, D, D': category
sig1, sig2: Signature_category C D D'
f: Signature_category C D D' ⟦ sig1, sig2 ⟧
X: [C, D']
pr1 f X =
pr1
  (roundtrip1_ob_nat_trans_data sig1
   · # (SignatureCategoryToActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory
        ∙ ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategoryToSignatureCategory)
       f) X

  
C, D, D': category
sig1, sig2: Signature_category C D D'
f: Signature_category C D D' ⟦ sig1, sig2 ⟧
X: [C, D']
pr1 f X = ?b
C, D, D': category
sig1, sig2: Signature_category C D D'
f: Signature_category C D D' ⟦ sig1, sig2 ⟧
X: [C, D']
?b =
pr1
  (roundtrip1_ob_nat_trans_data sig1
   · # (SignatureCategoryToActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory
        ∙ ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategoryToSignatureCategory)
       f) X

  
C, D, D': category
sig1, sig2: Signature_category C D D'
f: Signature_category C D D' ⟦ sig1, sig2 ⟧
X: [C, D']
?b =
pr1
  (roundtrip1_ob_nat_trans_data sig1
   · # (SignatureCategoryToActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory

       f) X
 
C, D, D': category
sig1, sig2: Signature_category C D D'
f: Signature_category C D D' ⟦ sig1, sig2 ⟧
X: [C, D']
?b =
nat_trans_comp (nat_trans_id (pr1 ((pr11 sig1) X)))
  ((pr11 f) X)
 
C, D, D': category
sig1, sig2: Signature_category C D D'
f: Signature_category C D D' ⟦ sig1, sig2 ⟧
X: [C, D']
nat_trans_comp (nat_trans_id (pr1 ((pr11 sig1) X)))
  ((pr11 f) X) = ?b
 apply (id_left(C:=[C, D])). 
C, D, D': category
sig1, sig2: Signature_category C D D'
f: Signature_category C D D' ⟦ sig1, sig2 ⟧
X: [C, D']
pr1 f X = (pr11 f) X

  apply idpath.
Qed.

Definition roundtrip1_ob_nat_trans :
  (functor_identity (Signature_category C D D')) ⟹
  SignatureCategoryToActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory ∙ ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategoryToSignatureCategory
  := (roundtrip1_ob_nat_trans_data,,roundtrip1_ob_data_is_nat_trans).


(* the following lemma cannot be used in the construction of the equivalence of categories *)

C, D, D': category
FF: actionbased_strong_functor Mon_endo'
  domain_action target_action
ab_strong_functor_from_signature
  (signature_from_strong_functor FF) = FF

  (signature_from_strong_functor FF) = FF

     (signature_from_strong_functor FF)) = pr1 FF

FF: actionbased_strong_functor Mon_endo'
  domain_action target_action
transportf
  (actionbased_strength Mon_endo' domain_action
     target_action) ?p
  (pr2
     (ab_strong_functor_from_signature
        (signature_from_strong_functor FF))) = pr2 FF

  domain_action target_action
pr1
  (ab_strong_functor_from_signature
     (signature_from_strong_functor FF)) = pr1 FF
 apply idpath.

     target_action) (idpath (pr1 FF))

     (signature_from_strong_functor FF)) = pr12 FF
C, D, D': category
FF: actionbased_strong_functor Mon_endo'
  domain_action target_action
transportf
  (λ x : actionbased_strength_nat Mon_endo'
           domain_action target_action (pr1 FF),
   actionbased_strength_triangle_eq Mon_endo'
     domain_action target_action (pr1 FF) x
   × actionbased_strength_pentagon_eq Mon_endo'
       domain_action target_action (pr1 FF) x) ?p
  (pr2
     (ab_strength_from_signature
        (signature_from_strong_functor FF))) = pr22 FF

     (signature_from_strong_functor FF)) = pr12 FF
 
C, D, D': category
FF: actionbased_strong_functor Mon_endo'
  domain_action target_action
∏ x : hom C D' ⊠ Mon_endo',
pr1
  (ab_strength_from_signature
     (signature_from_strong_functor FF)) x =
(pr12 FF) x

      intro x; apply idpath.
    
C, D, D': category
FF: actionbased_strong_functor Mon_endo'
  domain_action target_action
transportf
  (λ x : actionbased_strength_nat Mon_endo'
           domain_action target_action (pr1 FF),
   actionbased_strength_triangle_eq Mon_endo'
     domain_action target_action (pr1 FF) x
   × actionbased_strength_pentagon_eq Mon_endo'
       domain_action target_action (pr1 FF) x)
  (nat_trans_eq_alt
     (actionbased_strength_dom Mon_endo' target_action
        (pr1 FF))
     (actionbased_strength_codom Mon_endo'
        domain_action (pr1 FF))
     (pr1
        (ab_strength_from_signature
           (signature_from_strong_functor FF)))
     (pr12 FF)
     (λ x : hom C D' ⊠ Mon_endo', idpath ((pr12 FF) x)))
  (pr2
     (ab_strength_from_signature
        (signature_from_strong_functor FF))) = pr22 FF

  domain_action target_action
pr2
  (transportf
     (λ x : actionbased_strength_nat Mon_endo'

  domain_action target_action
pr1
  (transportf
     (λ x : actionbased_strength_nat Mon_endo'

     (λ x : actionbased_strength_nat Mon_endo'

C, D, D': category
FF: Strong_Functor_category Mon_endo' domain_action
  target_action
(λ f : FF ⟹ pr1 FF,
 ∏ (a : C ⟶ D') (v : ptd_obj C),
 Strong_Functor_Category_mor_diagram Mon_endo'
   domain_action target_action
   (FF,,
    ab_strength_from_signature
      (signature_from_strong_functor FF))
   (pr1 FF,, pr2 FF) f a v)
  (make_nat_trans FF (pr1 FF)
     ((λ X : hom_data C D', id₁ ((pr11 FF) X))
      :
      nat_trans_data FF (pr1 FF))
     ((λ (X1 X2 : hom_data C D')
       (f : hom_data C D' ⟦ X1, X2 ⟧),
       id_right (# (pr11 FF) f) @
       idpath (# (pr11 FF) f) @
       ! id_left (# (pr11 FF) f))
      :
      is_nat_trans FF (pr1 FF)
        ((λ X : hom_data C D', id₁ ((pr11 FF) X))
         :
         nat_trans_data FF (pr1 FF))))

  target_action
X: C ⟶ D'
Y: ptd_obj C

  domain_action target_action
  (FF,,
   ab_strength_from_signature
     (signature_from_strong_functor FF))
  (pr1 FF,, pr2 FF)
  (make_nat_trans FF (pr1 FF)
     (λ X : hom_data C D', id₁ ((pr11 FF) X))
     (λ (X1 X2 : hom_data C D')
      (f : hom_data C D' ⟦ X1, X2 ⟧),
      id_right (# (pr11 FF) f) @
      idpath (# (pr11 FF) f) @
      ! id_left (# (pr11 FF) f))) X Y

  target_action
X: C ⟶ D'
Y: ptd_obj C
ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory.ζ Mon_endo'
  domain_action target_action
  (FF,,
   ab_strength_from_signature
     (signature_from_strong_functor FF)) (X, Y)
· make_nat_trans FF (pr1 FF)
    (λ X : hom_data C D', id₁ ((pr11 FF) X))
    (λ (X1 X2 : hom_data C D')
     (f : hom_data C D' ⟦ X1, X2 ⟧),
     id_right (# (pr11 FF) f) @
     idpath (# (pr11 FF) f) @
     ! id_left (# (pr11 FF) f))
    (ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory.odot Mon_endo'
       domain_action (X, Y)) =
# (ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory.odot' Mon_endo'
     target_action)
  (make_nat_trans FF (pr1 FF)
     (λ X : hom_data C D', id₁ ((pr11 FF) X))
     (λ (X1 X2 : hom_data C D')
      (f : hom_data C D' ⟦ X1, X2 ⟧),
      id_right (# (pr11 FF) f) @
      idpath (# (pr11 FF) f) @
      ! id_left (# (pr11 FF) f)) X #, id₁ Y)
· ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory.ζ Mon_endo'
    domain_action target_action (pr1 FF,, pr2 FF)
    (X, Y)

FF: Strong_Functor_category Mon_endo' domain_action
  target_action
X: C ⟶ D'

(# (ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory.odot' Mon_endo'
      target_action)
   (make_nat_trans FF (pr1 FF)
      (λ X : hom_data C D', id₁ ((pr11 FF) X))
      (λ (X1 X2 : hom_data C D')

       id_right (# (pr11 FF) f) @
       idpath (# (pr11 FF) f) @
       ! id_left (# (pr11 FF) f)) X #, id₁ Y)
 · ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory.ζ Mon_endo'
     domain_action target_action (pr1 FF,, pr2 FF)
     (X, Y)) c

C, D, D': category
FF: Strong_Functor_category Mon_endo' domain_action
  target_action
(λ f : [hom C D', hom C D] ⟦ pr1 FF,
       pr1
         (ab_strong_functor_from_signature
            (signature_from_strong_functor FF)) ⟧,
 Core.mor_disp (pr2 FF)
   (pr2
      (ab_strong_functor_from_signature
         (signature_from_strong_functor FF))) f)
  (make_nat_trans (pr1 FF)
     (pr1
        (ab_strong_functor_from_signature
           (signature_from_strong_functor FF)))
     ((λ X : hom C D', id₁ ((pr11 FF) X))
      :
      nat_trans_data (pr1 FF)
        (pr1
           (ab_strong_functor_from_signature
              (signature_from_strong_functor FF))))
     ((λ (X1 X2 : hom C D') (f : hom C D' ⟦ X1, X2 ⟧),
       id_right (# (pr1 FF) f) @
       idpath
         (# (pr1
               (ab_strong_functor_from_signature
                  (signature_from_strong_functor FF)))
            f) @
       ! id_left
           (# (pr1
                 (ab_strong_functor_from_signature
                    (signature_from_strong_functor FF)))
              f))
      :
      is_nat_trans (pr1 FF)
        (pr1
           (ab_strong_functor_from_signature
              (signature_from_strong_functor FF)))
        ((λ X : hom C D', id₁ ((pr11 FF) X))
         :
         nat_trans_data (pr1 FF)
           (pr1
              (ab_strong_functor_from_signature
                 (signature_from_strong_functor FF))))))

      id_right (# (pr1 FF) f) @
      idpath
        (# (pr1
              (ab_strong_functor_from_signature
                 (signature_from_strong_functor FF)))
           f) @
      ! id_left
          (# (pr1
                (ab_strong_functor_from_signature
                   (signature_from_strong_functor FF)))
             f))
     (ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory.odot Mon_endo'
        domain_action (X, Y))) c = ?b

sig: Signature_category C D D'
# (left_functor
     (SignatureCategoryToActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory,,
      ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategoryToSignatureCategory,,
      roundtrip1_ob_nat_trans,,
      roundtrip2_ob_nat_trans))
  (adjunit
     (SignatureCategoryToActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory,,
      ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategoryToSignatureCategory,,
      roundtrip1_ob_nat_trans,,
      roundtrip2_ob_nat_trans) sig)
· adjcounit
    (SignatureCategoryToActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory,,
     ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategoryToSignatureCategory,,
     roundtrip1_ob_nat_trans,, roundtrip2_ob_nat_trans)
    (left_functor
       (SignatureCategoryToActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory,,
        ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategoryToSignatureCategory,,
        roundtrip1_ob_nat_trans,,
        roundtrip2_ob_nat_trans) sig) =
id₁
  (left_functor
     (SignatureCategoryToActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory,,
      ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategoryToSignatureCategory,,
      roundtrip1_ob_nat_trans,,
      roundtrip2_ob_nat_trans) sig)

      
C, D, D': category
sig: Signature_category C D D'
pr1
  (# (left_functor
        (SignatureCategoryToActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory,,
         ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategoryToSignatureCategory,,
         roundtrip1_ob_nat_trans,,
         roundtrip2_ob_nat_trans))
     (adjunit
        (SignatureCategoryToActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory,,
         ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategoryToSignatureCategory,,
         roundtrip1_ob_nat_trans,,
         roundtrip2_ob_nat_trans) sig)
   · adjcounit
       (SignatureCategoryToActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory,,
        ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategoryToSignatureCategory,,
        roundtrip1_ob_nat_trans,,
        roundtrip2_ob_nat_trans)
       (left_functor
          (SignatureCategoryToActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory,,
           ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategoryToSignatureCategory,,
           roundtrip1_ob_nat_trans,,
           roundtrip2_ob_nat_trans) sig)) =
pr1
  (id₁
     (left_functor
        (SignatureCategoryToActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory,,
         ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategoryToSignatureCategory,,
         roundtrip1_ob_nat_trans,,
         roundtrip2_ob_nat_trans) sig))

nat_trans_comp
  (ab_strength_mor_from_signature_mor_nat_trans
     (roundtrip1_ob_nat_trans_data sig))
  (make_nat_trans (pr1 sig) (pr1 sig)
     (λ X : C ⟶ D', nat_trans_id ((pr11 sig) X))
     (λ (X1 X2 : C ⟶ D') (f : X1 ⟹ X2),
      id_right (# (pr11 sig) f) @
      ! id_left (# (pr11 sig) f))) =
nat_trans_id (pr11 sig)

      
C, D, D': category
sig: Signature_category C D D'
∏ x : hom_data C D',
nat_trans_comp
  (ab_strength_mor_from_signature_mor_nat_trans
     (roundtrip1_ob_nat_trans_data sig))
  (make_nat_trans (pr1 sig) (pr1 sig)
     (λ X : C ⟶ D', nat_trans_id ((pr11 sig) X))
     (λ (X1 X2 : C ⟶ D') (f : X1 ⟹ X2),
      id_right (# (pr11 sig) f) @
      ! id_left (# (pr11 sig) f))) x =
nat_trans_id (pr11 sig) x

      
C, D, D': category
sig: Signature_category C D D'
X: hom_data C D'
nat_trans_comp
  (ab_strength_mor_from_signature_mor_nat_trans
     (roundtrip1_ob_nat_trans_data sig))
  (make_nat_trans (pr1 sig) (pr1 sig)
     (λ X : C ⟶ D', nat_trans_id ((pr11 sig) X))
     (λ (X1 X2 : C ⟶ D') (f : X1 ⟹ X2),
      id_right (# (pr11 sig) f) @
      ! id_left (# (pr11 sig) f))) X =
nat_trans_id (pr11 sig) X

      
C, D, D': category
sig: Signature_category C D D'
X: hom_data C D'
nat_trans_comp (nat_trans_id (pr1 ((pr11 sig) X)))
  (nat_trans_id ((pr11 sig) X)) =
nat_trans_id ((pr11 sig) X)

      apply (id_left(C:=[C, D])).
    
C, D, D': category
triangle_2_statement
  (SignatureCategoryToActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory,,
   ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategoryToSignatureCategory,,
   roundtrip1_ob_nat_trans,, roundtrip2_ob_nat_trans)
 
C, D, D': category
FF: Strong_Functor_category Mon_endo' domain_action
  target_action
adjunit
  (SignatureCategoryToActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory,,
   ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategoryToSignatureCategory,,
   roundtrip1_ob_nat_trans,, roundtrip2_ob_nat_trans)
  (right_functor
     (SignatureCategoryToActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory,,
      ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategoryToSignatureCategory,,
      roundtrip1_ob_nat_trans,,
      roundtrip2_ob_nat_trans) FF)
· # (right_functor
       (SignatureCategoryToActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory,,
        ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategoryToSignatureCategory,,
        roundtrip1_ob_nat_trans,,
        roundtrip2_ob_nat_trans))
    (adjcounit
       (SignatureCategoryToActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory,,
        ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategoryToSignatureCategory,,
        roundtrip1_ob_nat_trans,,
        roundtrip2_ob_nat_trans) FF) =
id₁
  (right_functor
     (SignatureCategoryToActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory,,
      ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategoryToSignatureCategory,,
      roundtrip1_ob_nat_trans,,
      roundtrip2_ob_nat_trans) FF)

      
C, D, D': category
FF: Strong_Functor_category Mon_endo' domain_action
  target_action
pr1
  (adjunit
     (SignatureCategoryToActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory,,
      ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategoryToSignatureCategory,,
      roundtrip1_ob_nat_trans,,
      roundtrip2_ob_nat_trans)
     (right_functor
        (SignatureCategoryToActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory,,
         ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategoryToSignatureCategory,,
         roundtrip1_ob_nat_trans,,
         roundtrip2_ob_nat_trans) FF)
   · # (right_functor
          (SignatureCategoryToActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory,,
           ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategoryToSignatureCategory,,
           roundtrip1_ob_nat_trans,,
           roundtrip2_ob_nat_trans))
       (adjcounit
          (SignatureCategoryToActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory,,
           ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategoryToSignatureCategory,,
           roundtrip1_ob_nat_trans,,
           roundtrip2_ob_nat_trans) FF)) =
pr1
  (id₁
     (right_functor
        (SignatureCategoryToActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory,,
         ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategoryToSignatureCategory,,
         roundtrip1_ob_nat_trans,,
         roundtrip2_ob_nat_trans) FF))

      
C, D, D': category
FF: Strong_Functor_category Mon_endo' domain_action
  target_action
nat_trans_comp
  (make_nat_trans FF FF
     (λ X : C ⟶ D', nat_trans_id (pr1 (pr1 FF X)))
     (λ (X1 X2 : C ⟶ D') (f : X1 ⟹ X2),
      id_right (# (pr1 FF) f) @
      ! id_left (# (pr1 FF) f)))
  (make_nat_trans FF (pr1 FF)
     (λ X : C ⟶ D', nat_trans_id ((pr11 FF) X))
     (λ (X1 X2 : C ⟶ D') (f : X1 ⟹ X2),
      id_right (# (pr11 FF) f) @
      ! id_left (# (pr11 FF) f))) =
nat_trans_id (pr1 FF)

      
C, D, D': category
FF: Strong_Functor_category Mon_endo' domain_action
  target_action
∏ x : functor_precategory_data C D',
nat_trans_comp
  (make_nat_trans FF FF
     (λ X : C ⟶ D', nat_trans_id (pr1 (pr1 FF X)))
     (λ (X1 X2 : C ⟶ D') (f : X1 ⟹ X2),
      id_right (# (pr1 FF) f) @
      ! id_left (# (pr1 FF) f)))
  (make_nat_trans FF (pr1 FF)
     (λ X : C ⟶ D', nat_trans_id ((pr11 FF) X))
     (λ (X1 X2 : C ⟶ D') (f : X1 ⟹ X2),
      id_right (# (pr11 FF) f) @
      ! id_left (# (pr11 FF) f))) x =
nat_trans_id (pr1 FF) x

      
C, D, D': category
FF: Strong_Functor_category Mon_endo' domain_action
  target_action
X: functor_precategory_data C D'
nat_trans_comp
  (make_nat_trans FF FF
     (λ X : C ⟶ D', nat_trans_id (pr1 (pr1 FF X)))
     (λ (X1 X2 : C ⟶ D') (f : X1 ⟹ X2),
      id_right (# (pr1 FF) f) @
      ! id_left (# (pr1 FF) f)))
  (make_nat_trans FF (pr1 FF)
     (λ X : C ⟶ D', nat_trans_id ((pr11 FF) X))
     (λ (X1 X2 : C ⟶ D') (f : X1 ⟹ X2),
      id_right (# (pr11 FF) f) @
      ! id_left (# (pr11 FF) f))) X =
nat_trans_id (pr1 FF) X

      
C, D, D': category
FF: Strong_Functor_category Mon_endo' domain_action
  target_action
X: functor_precategory_data C D'
nat_trans_comp (nat_trans_id (pr1 (pr1 FF X)))
  (nat_trans_id ((pr11 FF) X)) =
nat_trans_id (pr1 (pr1 FF X))

      apply (id_left(C:=[C, D])).
  
C, D, D': category
forms_equivalence
  (SignatureCategoryToActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory,,
   ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategoryToSignatureCategory,,
   roundtrip1_ob_nat_trans,, roundtrip2_ob_nat_trans)
 
C, D, D': category
∏ a : Signature_category C D D',
is_z_isomorphism
  (adjunit
     (SignatureCategoryToActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory,,
      ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategoryToSignatureCategory,,
      roundtrip1_ob_nat_trans,,
      roundtrip2_ob_nat_trans) a)
C, D, D': category
∏
b : Strong_Functor_category Mon_endo' domain_action
      target_action,
is_z_isomorphism
  (adjcounit
     (SignatureCategoryToActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory,,
      ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategoryToSignatureCategory,,
      roundtrip1_ob_nat_trans,,
      roundtrip2_ob_nat_trans) b)

    
C, D, D': category
∏ a : Signature_category C D D',
is_z_isomorphism
  (adjunit
     (SignatureCategoryToActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory,,
      ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategoryToSignatureCategory,,
      roundtrip1_ob_nat_trans,,
      roundtrip2_ob_nat_trans) a)
 
C, D, D': category
sig: Signature_category C D D'
is_z_isomorphism
  (adjunit
     (SignatureCategoryToActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory,,
      ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategoryToSignatureCategory,,
      roundtrip1_ob_nat_trans,,
      roundtrip2_ob_nat_trans) sig)

      apply (_,,roundtrip1_ob_data_is_nat_z_iso sig).
    
C, D, D': category
∏
b : Strong_Functor_category Mon_endo' domain_action
      target_action,
is_z_isomorphism
  (adjcounit
     (SignatureCategoryToActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory,,
      ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategoryToSignatureCategory,,
      roundtrip1_ob_nat_trans,,
      roundtrip2_ob_nat_trans) b)
 
C, D, D': category
FF: Strong_Functor_category Mon_endo' domain_action
  target_action
is_z_isomorphism
  (adjcounit
     (SignatureCategoryToActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory,,
      ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategoryToSignatureCategory,,
      roundtrip1_ob_nat_trans,,
      roundtrip2_ob_nat_trans) FF)

      apply (_,,roundtrip2_ob_data_is_nat_z_iso FF).
Defined.

(* source and target category of the functors are deemed to be univalent if parameter category D is *)

C, D, D': category
univD: is_univalent D
is_univalent (Signature_category C D D')


C, D, D': category
univD: is_univalent D
is_univalent (Signature_category C D D')

  
C, D, D': category
univD: is_univalent D
univalentD:= make_univalent_category D univD: univalent_category
is_univalent (Signature_category C D D')

  exact (is_univalent_Signature_category C univalentD D').
Defined.

(** the remainder of this file documents failing efforts - these problems ought to be gone after merging PR #1402 *)

(*

(* some hopeless efforts *)
Lemma Strong_Functor_category_is_univalent (univD : is_univalent D) :
  is_univalent (Strong_Functor_category Mon_endo' domain_action target_action
                                        (functor_category_has_homsets _ _ hsD)).
Proof.
  set (univalentD := make_univalent_category D (make_is_univalent (pr1 univD) hsD)).
  set (univalentA' := make_univalent_category [C, D, hsD] (make_is_univalent (pr1(is_univalent_functor_category C D (pr1 univD,,hsD))) (functor_category_has_homsets _ _ hsD))).
  change (is_univalent
              (Strong_Functor_category Mon_endo' domain_action target_action (homset_property univalentA'))).
  assert (target_action' := target_action).
  change (action Mon_endo' (hom(C:=bicat_of_cats) (C,, hs) (univalent_category_to_category univalentD))) in target_action'.

(*
    exact (is_univalent_Strong_Functor_category Mon_endo' [C, D', hsD'] univalentA' domain_action target_action').
*)


 (* the following lemma can only come from univalence of the involved categories *)
Lemma SignatureCategoryAndActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory_z_iso_law :
  is_inverse_in_precat(C:=bicat_of_cats)
                      (a:=Signature_category (C,,hs) (D,,hsD) (D',,hsD'))
                      (b:=Strong_Functor_category Mon_endo' domain_action target_action
                                                  (functor_category_has_homsets _ _ hsD))
                      SignatureCategoryToActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory
                      ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategoryToSignatureCategory.
Proof.

(*
Definition SignatureCategoryAndActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory_z_iso :
  z_iso(C:=bicat_of_cats) (Signature_category (C,,hs) (D,,hsD) (D',,hsD'))
                      (Strong_Functor_category Mon_endo' domain_action target_action
                                               (functor_category_has_homsets _ _ hsD)).
Proof.
  exists SignatureCategoryToActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory.
  exists ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategoryToSignatureCategory.
  exact SignatureCategoryAndActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory_z_iso_law.
Defined.
 *)


*)
End Instantiation_To_FunctorCategory_And_PointedEndofunctors.

(*
Section Instantiation_To_FunctorCategory_And_PointedEndofunctors_Univalence.
  Context (C : category) (D : univalent_category) (D' : category).
  Definition BothCategoriesUnivalent:
  is_univalent (Signature_category C D D') ×
               is_univalent (Strong_Functor_category (Mon_endo' C (homset_property C))
                                                     (domain_action C (homset_property C) D' (homset_property D'))
                                                     (target_action C (homset_property C) D (homset_property D))
                                                     (functor_category_has_homsets _ _ (homset_property D))).
  Proof.
    split.
    - exact (is_univalent_Signature_category C D D').
    - set (univalentA' := make_univalent_category [C, D, homset_property D]
                           (is_univalent_functor_category C D (univalent_category_is_univalent D))).
      change (is_univalent (Strong_Functor_category (Mon_endo' C (homset_property C))
                                                    (domain_action C (homset_property C) D' (homset_property D'))
                                                    (target_action C (homset_property C) D (homset_property D))
                                                    (homset_property univalentA'))).
      (* for checking purposes: *)
      assert (target := target_action C (homset_property C) D (homset_property D)).
      (* the following works but does not help in the sequel:
      change (action (Mon_endo' C (homset_property C)) (hom(C:=bicat_of_cats) C (univalent_category_to_category D))) in target. *)
      assert (test1 : pr1 univalentA' = [C, D, homset_property D]).
      { apply idpath. }
      clear test1.
      set (test2 := pr22 univalentA').
      cbn in test2. unfold functor_category_has_homsets in test2.
      set (test3 := pr2 bicat_of_cats C (univalent_category_to_category D)).
      cbn in test3. unfold isaset_cells_prebicat_of_cats in test3.
      assert (test4 : test3 = test2).
      { apply idpath. } (* okay thanks to changes in UniMath/Bicategories/Core/Examples/BicatOfCatsWithoutUnivalence.v
       and UniMath/CategoryTheory/FunctorCategory.v  *)
      clear test2 test3 test4.
      (* does not terminate:
      change (action (Mon_endo' C (homset_property C)) (univalentA')) in target. *)

      (*

                   action (Mon_endo' C (homset_property C)) (univalentA')).
      { split.
        intro act.
        induction act as [odot [ρ [χ [triangle pentagon]]]].
        exists odot.
        exists ρ.
        (* does not terminate: exists χ. *)
      }
*)
      set (what_we_want_without_last_argument := is_univalent_Strong_Functor_category (Mon_endo' C (homset_property C))
                                                     (hom(C:=bicat_of_cats) C D')

                                                     (domain_action C (homset_property C) D' (homset_property D'))).

      exact what_we_want.

  End Instantiation_To_FunctorCategory_And_PointedEndofunctors_Univalence.
